pericopes.title: Mi kiletsah te chunga Pakai thutanna
Judah leh Jerusalem chunga Pakai thutanna
Isaiah mu nei chule ama kikou
Ahaz henga Isaiah thupoh thangkou amasa
Nagin dingu chu Pakai hijo hen.
Jesse bah a kon vaihom dih
Amoh cheng loupi tah a ahung kilekit
Ethiopia chung chang thua themgao thusei
Assyrian Egypt le Ethiopia ajo ding
Twikhanglen pang gamthip noi thudola thuchih
Themgao thilmu na phaicham thudola thuchih
Shebna chu Eli’akim kikhel ding ahi
Tyre le Sidon chung chang thudola thuchih
Pakai lunglhai jeh a vabchoina la
Egypt mite mihembou ahi, Pathen ahipouve
Pakaiyin Huhhingna ahln lhut ding ahi.
Namtin vaipi le Edom douna Pakai lungsat
Hezeki’ah chun Babylon mi palaiho alamdot @9(2
Zion dinga Pakaiyin lhamonna thu asei
Pakaiyin thahat tah a mi ahuhdoh vahchoina
Babylon mite milim semthu ho chule Pakai.
Pathenin sohchanna kona Zion ahuhdoh ding
Pathena kitepna nit jeh a kipaman

chapters.text: Judah lengte Uzziah le Jotham, Ahaz le Hezekiah lal laiya Judah gam le Jerusalem chung chang thudola Amoz chapa Isaiah kitipan mu aneiya athilmu chu.
@@O vanin ngaiyin, chule leiset’in nakol hinsung temin; @2Ajeh chu Pakaiyin thu aseitai. @1Chapa pasal tampi kavah khangin kahin @3seiletsah tan, @2Ahinla amahon keima dounan thil @3aboltauve.
@@@1Bongchal chun apupa akihet’in, @2Sangan’in jong apun an apehna ankong @3ahei; @2Israel’in vang ahephapon, @1Kamite hin ahekhen thei him him @3pouve,” ati.

@@@1Ohe, chonse nam mite, @2Themmona dimset mite, @1Agilou bolte chilhah ho, @2Giloutah-a thilbol chapate! @1Hiche miho hin Pakai adalha tauvin, @2Israel Mithengpa chu adonda tauve; @3ajam mangsoh-ah ahitauve.
@@@1Ipi dinga doumah mah nabol’uva, @2Tugeiya nakijeplo lo diu hi tam? @1Aluchang apumpin anatan, @2Alungthim apumpin achol’e
@@@1Kengtoa pat luchang geiyin abit kom @3aum tapoi. @2Akitat dup jengleh apat lai jeng, @1chule athilong maha jeng ahin; @2Anaila akimehdoh pon, tomjong @3akitompon, thaola akinu jolpon,
@@@1Nagamsungu jong akidalha thipdel tan, @2Nakhopi jouseu jong meiyin akatai; @1Na-angsung tah-uva gamdang miten @3nagamu alosoh tan, @2Akidalha thip soh hel’in, gamdang miten @3alehkhup hel tauve.
@@@1Zion chanu chu lengpileiya buh kisong @3tobang leh @2Changmai leiya buh kisong bangin akidalhan, @3khopi kichom kangsa abange.
@@@1Hatchungnung Pakaiyin, @2Ahingdoh themkhat beh eikhen louvu hileh, @1Eiho Sodom toh ibang jenguva, @2Gomorrah toh ibah jeng dingu ahi.
@@@1Sodom khoa vaihomten Pakai thusei @3hi ngaiyuvin lang, @2Gomorrah kho miten ka-Pathenu mihilna a @3hin nakol sung temuvin!

@@@1“Nakilhainau gantha hijatpi hi @2Ken ipi ding kati ding ham?” tin @3Pakaiyin aseiye. @1“Keiman kelngoichal pumgo thilto tampi @3kaneiyin, @2Gancha kivah thao tah tah jeng jong @3kaneiye; @1Keiman bongchal tampi thisan hihen, @3kelngoite thisan hileh @2Kelchate thisan hijongleh kakipa @3pipoi.
@@@1“Kahenga nahung tenguleh, @2Koiham keima inpi chonthang dinga @3kouvuvah?

@@@1Thilto pannabei ho chu hintoh kit @3hih hel’uvin, @2Gimnamtui jong kei dia thet umtah @3ahibouve. @1Lhathah nikho jong cholngah nikho jong, @2abol diu khoppi kikoukhom nikho @3hijongleh, @1Themmona leh khoppi theng ahivanga kadouthei @3lou ahiye.
@@@1Nalha thah kut bolu ahin, phat tepsa @3kut nabol jouseu hi, @2Kahinkhoa kadeilou kahot ahi. @1Hiche ho chu keidingin pohgih bep ahin, @2Abonchan kapo chimtai.
@@@1Nakhut phanga neihin san tenguleh @2Kamit kasin khum ding nahiuve; @1Ijeh-inem itile tao tao jong leu chun @2Kangaipeh lou ding nahiuve; @3nakhut’u thisan adime.
@@@1Kisil ngimuvin lang kisuthenguvin, @2Kamit mun thil gilou nabol jouseu tol @3manguvin lang, @1Thilse bolkit datauvin. @2Thilpha bolje kithem chuh-uvin lang,
@@@1Thu adih a tan din gouvin, @2Bol gentheina thohho chu sudih-uvin lang, @1Pabei chagate thu adih-in tanpeh uvin; @2Meithaite ding thil dih seipeh-uvin,
@@@1Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, @2“Hunguvin kihou toh uhite; @1Nachonset’u thisan bang jongleh @2Buhbang banga bang ding nahiuve; @1Sandup je ju jongleh, @2Kelngoimul jolsel tobang hiding ahi.
@@@1Nanghon nadeiyuva thu nangaiyuleh @2Gamsunga apha chu naneh dingu ahi.
@@@1Amavang nadauva doumah mah nabol @3vanguleh @2Chemjama nalousoh kei dingu ahi; @1Ajeh chu Pakai kamsungin thu aseitai.” ati.
@@@1I-atileh khopi kitah tah chu noti @3a panga hitam? @2Akhopia chun thu adih jengin akitan me! @1Khosunga jong adih jeng alengin ahi; @2Tunla tolthat jengin apang tai.
@@@1Nadangka chu thih-eh asoh tan, @2Nalengpitwi jong twi toh akihal @3tam tai.

@@@1Milen milal’a naneiho jong doumah @3mah bol’in apanguvin. @2Guchate jol le gol’in apang tauve. @1Amitakip’in nehguh adeiyin. @2Aguh a thilpeh ding adel le leuve. @1Pa beiya umte chaga thula atankhoh @3peh pouvin, @2Meithaite thu atanpeh diuvin ahengu @3alhung joutapoi.
@@@1Hijeh chun Pakai, Hatchungnung Yahweh, @2Israel dia mihatpa chun hitin aseiye. @1“A! Keiman kamelmate chu kalungsat khuma, @2Eidoute chunga keima mong mongin phu @3kahin lah ding ahi.
@@@1Keiman nang douna kakhut kalap’a, @2Nathih-eh chu sumtwiya kahin lhah khena, @1Nasum kilhajol chengse @2Kaloikhen soh keiding ahi.

@@@1Chutengleh amasa banga nangma dia thutan @3vaihomho kapansah kit’a, @2Nathu mop’a pang jouse jong chu akipat @3til’a bang hi ding ahi. @1Hichejou teng chuleh nangma hi dihna @3khopi, @2Khopi kitah tah, nakiti ding ahi.” ati.
@@@1Thu adih-a akitan teng Zion lhatdam @3changin tin, @2Asunga cheng adih a lungkhelte chu @3kilhatdoh diu ahi.
@@@1Doumah bolte leh chonse ho vang kisuh @3mang than tin, @2Chule Pakai jamsante chu kibahgam ding @3ahiuve.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itile nathanop piu gangpi @3phung ho @2Chu nakijumso nau hi ding, @1Nakilhensau honlei jouse jong chu @2Maisan hel’a nathohpi dingu ahi.
@@@1Ajeh chu nangho ana gopsa gangpi @3phung nabah-uva, @2Twi lutna lou honlei toh nabah dingu @3ahi.
@@@1Chule mihat chu saikhao nemtah bang @3ding, @2Anatoh jong chu meisi pahbep hi ding @3ahi. @1Amajong anatoh jong kavam lhon ding, @2Aphel mit ding koima cha umlou @3ding ahi.
@@@1Hiche thil hi Amoz chapa Isaiah chun @2Judah le Jerusalem chung chang thudola @3anamu, amunei chu ahi.

@@@1Ni nu nung phatle hung hiti ding ahi, @2Pakai inmun molsang chu @1Molsang jouse sanga asang pena hung @3kitungdoh ding, @2Thinglhang jouse vuma hung kikhang @3doh ding ahin; @1Hiche laiya chu @2Namtin vaipi hung lhai khom cheh @3ding ahiuve.

@@@1Hichele chun chitin namtin hunguva hita @3asei dingu, @2Hunguvin Pakai molsanga kijot touvu @3hite, @1Jacob Pathen inmun lama chun; @2Aman alampi aboncha eihil’uva, @1Chutengle eiho jong ama lamlhah dunga @3ivale theina dinguvin,” atidiu ahi, @2Ajeh chu Ziona kona danthu hung potdoh @3ding, @2Jerusalema kona Pakai thusei hung @3potdoh ding ahi.

@@@1Chutia chu aman namtin vaipi kah a @3thu ahintan ding, @2Chule chitin namtin dinga thugei @3ahin lhe ding, @1Mihon achemjamu tucha akikhenuva, @2Atengchau jong kangkuiya akikhen diu, @1Nam khat’in nam khat douna dinga @2Chemjam alap louhel ding ahi; @1Koijoh ahiya galbol kihiljo sang @2Hung um kit lou ding ahitai.
@@@1Vo Jacob insung hunguvin, @2Pakai vah a kijot uhite.

@@@1Ijeh-nem itile nangman namite @2Jacob insung chu napaitai, @1Ajeh chu amaho niso lama hung kon @3akigaote adimset’uvin, @2Philistine ho bangin mitphel @3doiththem adim’uvin, @1Gamdang mite chate toh akhut abeng @3khomuvin ahi.
@@@1Jacob gamsung hi dangka le sana adim tan, @2Ahivangin amapa goukhol la angahna @3aumdeh pon; @1Agamsung hi sakolte adimpaiya ahitan, @2Ama dingin sakol kangtalai ho hi la @3akingahna aumdeh poi.
@@@1Agamsung hi milim kisemthu ho adimpaiya @3ahitan, @2Miho thilsem koma akun’uvin chibai aboh @3tauve; @1Amahon hitobang thil ho hi @2Akhut mong monga asemdoh-u ahi.
@@@1Hiti hin mihem chu sot lhah-in umin tin, @2Mihem chu suhnema umding ahi; @3amaho chu ngaidam lou jen nin!
@@@1Songko sunga lut’in, leivui lah a @3chun kisel mangin, @2Tijat umtah Pakai masangleh alal loupi @3masanga chun.
@@@1Mihemin mi avetneo na chu kisu neova, @2Mihemte kiletsahna chu kisunem ding, @1Hiche nikho chuleh Pakai ama changseh @2bou choisanga um ding ahi.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itile Pakai hatchungnung chun @2Mi kiletsahte le mi kithang atte, @1Mi kichoi sangte leh @2Mi kidom sangte dounan nikho khat @3aneiye,
@@@1Lebanona cedar thing huikai ho leh @3akidoh sang ho douna, @2Bashan phaiya gangpi thing ho douna,
@@@1Molsang jouse douna leh @2Thinglhang sang jouse douna,
@@@1Intingvum sang lai jouse douna leh @2Galpal kikaiden kulpi jouse douna,
@@@1Tarshish a kong innei ho douna @3leh @2Khut thema kisem thil hoitah tah ho @3douna nikho khat aneiye.
@@@1Mihem mi noisena chu kisu nema, @2Mihemte kiletsahna chu sot lhah a @3kikoi ding ahi; @2Hiche nikho chuleh Pakai ama changseh bou @3choisanga um ding ahi.
@@@1Chutengleh milim kisemthu jouse @2Kitol mang ding ahi.

@@@1Chule mihemte songko sung dunga @3lut’uva, @2Leiko dunga hung lut ding ahiuve. @1Tijat umtah Pakai masang leh @2Ama lal loupi masanga chu, @1Ama leiset tijatsah dinga @2Ahung kipatdoh teng chuleh.
@@@1Hiche nikho le chun mihemin @2Adangka milim ho le asana milim ho, @1Chibai boh dinga anasem chengseu chu @2Bui ho leh bah ho koma ahinse @3manguva,

@@@1Songpi ko sung dunga hung lut’a @2Songpi ko sung dung le songpi khi @3kah dunga @2Hung lut le ding ahi, @1Tijat umtah Pakai masangleh @2Ama lal loupi masanga chu, @1Ama leiset tijatsah dinga @2Ahung kipatdoh teng chuleh.
@@@1Nangho dingin vang mihema konin @3jamdoh-uvin, @2Anahhom sunga haithei mai maipa a @3konchun; @1Ajeh chu ama ija kingaitoa ham?
@@@1Ijeh-inem itile vetan, @2Pakai hatchungnung Yahweh chun @1Jerusalem leh Judah gama konin @2Akihenna le aki ngap na chu. @1Ahakamna chang lhah jouse leh @2Adang nouna twi jouse jong; atol mangtai,
@@@1Mihatpa leh sepai pang mi ahin, @2Thutan vaihomle themgao ahin @1Agaotheipa leh upa pu ahin,
@@@1Mi som nga lamkaipa leh @2Lamkai masa pa ahin, @1Thu mop’a pang leh mitphel doithempa ahin, @2Chule ailhim thempa geiyin jong @3atolmang thai,
@@@1Chuteng keiman miho dinga chapang cha @3cha milen milal’a kapansah-a @2Naosen cha chan achunguva vai ahom @3diu ahi.

@@@1Hichele chun mipi chu khat’in khat @3abolgentheiya, @2Mihem khat chun amihem chanpi abolset @3ding, @2Ami tinin aheng akom abolgenthei ding ahi, @1Khangdong jong chun @2Upa ahin vet tom ding, @1Pannabei min jong ja umtah mi chu @3anoise ding ahi.

@@@1Mi khat chun apa insunga asopi pasal @3khat chu atuhdet dena @2“Nangman ponsil naneiye, @1Keiho lamkaiyin hung pangin lang, @2Alhu lhamsa mi hicheng hi nangma vaihomna @3noiya umding ahiuve,” tia @4aseiyu jongleh,
@@@1Hiche nikho chuleh aman aseiya, @2“Keima koima hoithei kahipoi, @1Ka-insunga jong neh ding chah ding jong @3aumpon, ponsil jong aumpoi, @2Japi lamkai din neipansah dauvin,” @3tia asei ding ahi.

@@@1Ijeh-inem itileh Jerusalem kipal lhua @2Judah gam jong alhua ahitai; @1Ijeh ham itile athilbol anatoh jouse lhon @2Pakai douna jeng ahijin, @1Pakai loupi tah a aumpet’in amaichang @3chang-ah ataitom lhone.

@@@1Alang neina lhon chu amani hehsen @3apangin, @2Achonsetna lhon jong Sodom chonsetna @3bangin min aphonjal peh tan, @1Aselmang peh pouve. @2Ohe! ada ahi lhon tai. @1Ijeh-inem itile nachung lhona min agilou @3nalhut khum lhontai.
@@@1Midih vang chu seipeh-in amaho dingin @3apha nai, @2Ajeh chu amahon atohgau akineh tei dingu @3ahiye.
@@@1Ohe! migilou chu ada ahi, ama din @3vang thilpha aumpoi; @2Ajeh chu akhut te nia athilbol tobang bang @3chu achunga kibol khum ding ahi.
@@@1Kamite kiti hi amaho bolgentheiya pangte @3chate jeng ahitauvin, @2Achunguva numei vaihomin apangtai @1Vo kamite, nalamkai teuvin lam hilouva @3napui tauvin, @2Nalampiu asunoh gamtauvin ahi.
@@@1Pakai chu thutan dingin alaltouna a @3atoutan, @2Amite thutan dingin ading tai.
@@@1Pakai chu amite upate leh milen milal @3ho toh thutan din alut’in, @2“Lengpilei bahgam a nangho nahiuvin, @1Mivaichate thil kichomdoh chengse chu @2Nangho insunga aumtai.
@@@1Ipi dinga kamite nachilgoiyuva, @2Mivaichate maichang sumheiya nagoiyu ham?” @3tin Pakai, @1Hatchungnung Yahweh chun aseiye.
@@@1Pakai chun aseiyin, “Zion chanute @3ahoithouvin, @2Ngong vaiput’a avaleuva, @1Pannabeiya mittol leu louva mi a @3vet’uva, @2Keng dildot dot’a lam ajot vanguvin,
@@@1Pakaiyin Zion chanute chu alujangu @3dulchet chut’a ahinjep’a, @2Atahsa aselguh lai jouse jong ahinho doh @3pehdiu ahiye.
Hiche nikho chuleh Pakaiyin ngalvei hoitah tah le lukop jouse jong ngong-o jouse jong abansut lhah a,
bilba jouse leh chaojang jouse jong ngongveiho jouse jong asut lhah ding,
pon lukhuh jouse le bantom ho jong, konga kivei pon ho jong asut lhah ding, gimnamtui thingkong jouse le, chule damtheina ponsil ho jong asuhmang ding,
khutjem ho hihen lang nahhoma kibat chaokol ho hileh asutlhah a,
golvahna kimang ponsil jouse le ponsil adang jong sangkhol chol ho hihen khut’a kikhai sakhao ho hijongleh alah manga,
bangkot’a kidal pon ho hijongleh tupat ponnem jouse jong delkop ho gei geiya pon lukhuh ho jeng jong khen louva aboncha alah mangsoh kei ding ahi.

@@@1Gimnamtui khel’a auile amonsa joh @3hung um ding, @2Konggah khel’a kikanna khaojang @3hi ding, @1Sam hoitah a kipotjol khel’a luchang @3tol hel’a mi umding, @2Ponsil chol hoitah khel’a khaodip @3pon kisil ding, @2Mel-hoi sanga chu @3Jachatna hung hijo ding,
@@@1Napasalteu chemjama lou diu, @2Nami hat lailai jouseu jong @3galmuna kijamchap diu ahi.
@@@1Chutengleh akulpi kelkot jousen @3apul adouva kap diu, @1Zion chu numei banga aponsil teldeh @2dub a tolchanga kikhelpha @3dending ahi

Hiche nikho chuleh numei sagi pasal khat kichu uva hitia @3asei diu, “Keihon ka-an kineh uvin ting kaponsil ding kanihchen ding ki-ngaito nauvinge, nangman jin neisemin, na-insunga neichensah poupouvun, minset pua ka umnau hi subei pou pou tan,” ati dingu ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh Pakaiya kona abah jamdoh chu vetnom hung uma loupi ding chule Israel ahingdoh chengse dinga agam leiset ga chu athupi nau le aloupi nau hi ding ahi.
Chutengleh Zion a kidalhapa Jerusalema umden pa chu atheng kiti ding, Jerusalema hinkhoa dinga kijih lut chengse jong theng ding,

Pakaiyin Zion chanute nen jouse asopthenga, Jerusalem lailunga kona lhagao meikong ahinlha a, thutanna lhagao ahinlha ding, Jerusalem chunga thisan beh jouse chu asoptheng soh tengleh Jerusalem chu atheng kiti ding ahi.

Hiche le chun Pakaiyin Zion chung vumle akhopia kikhom miho chunga sun teng meilhang ahinbol sah-a jan teng meikhu akhutdoh sah-a meikong akondoh sah ding ahi; hichengse loupina chung vum peh a jong chu golnop vetna insang kisa a toumun lim kisong ding ahiye.
Hiche chu sun tengle nisa lima pang ding, gojuh gel lhah tengleh kiselna a kimang ding ahi.
@@@1Keiman kadeipa dingin alengpilei @3lachoi la sange, @1Kadeipan thing lhang gamleipha tah @2a lengpilei khat ananeiye.

@@@1Aman alei alhouvin song jouse akaldoh @3soh tai, @2Chuin lengpithei phapen tah aphut’in @3ahi; @1Hichun alailung tah-a thing chung buh @3khat asan, @2Aman lengpitwi lhoh na khat asemin, @1Hichea chun lengpithei ga ding ho @3angah-in ahile @2Amala gamlah lengpithei jeng ahung @3gajo tai.
@@@1Hijeh chun tun Vo Jerusalema chengte @3leh Judah gam mite, @2Keile kalengpilei kah-a thu neihin @3tanpeh tem’uvin.
@@@1Kalengpilei dinga kabol lou ipi bat @3kanei nah lai ham? @2Lengpithei hung ga ding kingah-a, @3ipi dia gamlah lengpithei @4hung gaham?
@@@1Hijeh chun tun keiman kalengpilei chu @2Ipi kabolpeh be ding ham @3seitem minge. @1Keiman atho phe lha leng @2Min negam tante, @1Apal vo-lhu soh keileng @2Min keng chotpha anei jeng @3ding ahi.

@@@1Keiman gamchang noi kasosah a @3akeova kakoi ding, @2Mal jong kimalngim lou ding ahamkeh @3kilhou lou ding, @1Lingle khao jouse hung kehdoh @3ding ahi; @2Meilhang jousen jong @1Go ahin juhsah louhel na dinguva @2Keiman thu kapeh ding ahiye.

@@@1Hiche Hatchungnung Pakai lengpilei @3kiti hi, @2Israel insung ahin. @1Judah gam mite alungdeiya akiphu @2thingphung chu ahi; @1Hijeh a chu aman thu adih a tan @3ding agel ding ahin; @2Ahinla vetan thisan kiso na @3jeng ahi; @1Adih ahol ahin @2Ahin vetemin ka o-gin akithonge!
@@@1Ohe, ada nahiuve, in kichoh be @3be ho @2Lou kehbe be jeng ho, mun @3beihel’a koiho. @1Gam lailunga nang ho hi @2Nachangseh-a nakichensah-u @3ahitai.
@@@1Kanabeng tah a Hatchungnung Pakai @3chu akihahsel’in, @2“In atama tam ahomkeova uma, @1In len tah tah le in hoitah tah @3jouse jong @2Acheng ding beiya hung umsoh @3ding ahi.
@@@1Leiset masom lhingset lengpileiyin @3jong @2Alousoh bath khat bep bou @3apensah ding, @1Chule muchi homer khat chun aga @2ephah khatbou asosah ding ahi” ati.
@@@1Ohe ada ahiuve khamna thei don @3dinga @2Jingpi tah a thouji mi ho, @1Jutwijin achup hel kahseuva @2Jankhang khang geiya jantoute!

@@@1Amahon golvah abol tenguva din @3semjang le selangdah jong aneiyun, @2Tumging le theile, chule lengpitwi @3jong aneiyui; @1Pakai natoh athilbol jouse @2Khohsah na anei pouvin, @1Akhutsoh thilsem ho jong amupha @3pouve.
@@@1Hetna lhahsam jeh-in @2Kamite sohchangin acheuvin, @1Jabol tah tah a aneiyu miho jong @2Gilkel’in athigam tauve; @1Amiteu jong abonchauvin @2Dangchah-in akihulgo gamtauve.

@@@1Hijeh chun noimigam jengin jong @2Aduchan alol-hom thamhel hol’in @3a don @1Chule akam jong vetngam louvin @3akadah hei huiye, @2Jerusalem milen milalte leh mipi @3ho abonchan, @1Amaho le amaho kichoisang khosung @3mipi ho gei geiyin, @2Akijotsuh-uvin akitol lhatauve.
@@@1Mihem akison kunin, miho akisu @3nemsoh tai, @2Chule mi kiletsah te jeng jong @3amit hau anguitai;
@@@1Ahin thaneipen Pakai chu thudih-in @3akichoi sangin, @2Chule Pathen theng chu ama le ama @3adih-in akiphongtai.
@@@1Chuteng kelngoite hamhing lah a @3lha leuvin tin, @2Khogem lah a bong thaotah tah ho @3le kelngoi noute lha le @4ding ahiuve.
@@@1Ohe ada ahiuve, themmona bola @3jouthua kikan ho, @2Kangtalaiyin khaojang tampi akai @3banga chonset kaikhomte;

@@@1Hita seiya, “Keiho muthei dingin @3kino loi hen lang @2Atoh ding chu tong loi hen, @1Israel dinga @2Mithengpa ngaito chu hung nailoi hen @3lang, @1Keihon kahet theina dinguvin hung @3lhung hen,” ti ho.
@@@1Ohe ada ahiuve, thilpha lou @3thilpha hisah-a @2Thilpha thilse hisah ho; @1Muthim khovah hisah-a, @2Khovah muthim hisah ho; @1Akha alhum hisah a, @2Alhum joh akha hisah ho!

Uzzi’ah lengpa thi kum chun keiman @2Pakai laltouna chunga sang tah a atouva, akikhansang kanamun, alalpon chu houin sung anadim set’e.
Ama chunga chun seraphimte ana dinguvin, khat khat’in lhaving gup cheh aneiyuvin, alhaving nin amai akhun, alhaving ni man akengphang te ni akhun, alhaving nin apansan alenguve.
@@Chuin seraphim khat chun seraphim khat ma chu akouvin ajah a, @2“Atheng, Atheng, Atheng kiti chu @3thaneipen Pakai ahin, @2Leiset pumpi hi ama loupina adimsoh e,” ati.
Hichun ahinkoupa ogina konin Houin kot bulpi jouse akiling soh tan, houin chu meikhu adimset tai.

Chuphat’in keiman, “Ohe ada kahitai! Ijeh-inem itile keima amangthah kahitai; ajeh chu keima mi kamtheng lou kahin, mi kamthengloute jalah a cheng kha kahiye; ajeh chu kamit te nin lengpa thaneipen Pakai chu amutai !” kati.
Hichun seraphim ho lah a konin khat chu kahenga ahung lengin akhut’a chun maicham phunga kona chaiche a ahinche doh mei-al ahinchoiye.
Chuin kakam ahinde khan aseiye, “Ven, hiche hin nanephu teni a tong kha tan, nathemmona akila mangtai, chule nachonset aki ngaidam tai,” ati.
Hichun Pakai oginin hita asei keiman kajai, “Koiham keiman kasol ding mi chu, chule koipen ham keiho dinga che ding mi chu?” ati. Chuin ken jong, “Keima kaum nai, neisolin!” kati.

Judah lengpa Uzzi’ah chapa Jotham chapa Ahaz lal laiyin Syria lengpa Rezin le Israel lengpa Remali’ah chapa Pekah chu Jerusalem douna galbol din ahung kontou lhonin, ahivangin anadeh jou lhonpoi.
David insung jah a akiseipeh a, “Syria chu E’phraim toh apangkhom tai,” akiti phat’in ama jong amite jong alung thimu khohui masanga thing kihot lingsoh bangin, aling laosoh tauve.
Hichun Pakaiyin Isaiah jah a, “Nangleh nachapa She’ar-jashub chu ponsoppa loulama twikul sahnungjo twilam monga khun Ahaz toh kimuto din potdoh lhon temin.
chuteng Ahazjah a, “Kigingphan, umthim beh-in, kicha hih-in Remali’ah chapa le Rezin toh chule mite khubanga Syria alungsatnau hol kilhut al-leng lung tobang khu nalungthimin tijatnan neihih hel’in.
Ajeh chu Syria mite leh E’phraim apang khomin, chule Remali’ah chapa geiyin nangma dounan thil gilou angai-touvin hitin aseiyui,
“Judah gam dounan kitoltouvu hite, chujongleh gakisatpiu tin gajouvu hite chutengleh agamsunga khun Ta’be-el chapa hi lengin gatungu tin pansah u hite,” tia aseivanguvin,
@@Pakai Pathen chun hitin aseiye, @1‘Dingjou deh lou ding, @2Chule guilhung lou ding ahi.

@@@1Ajeh chu Syria khopi lenpen aluchang @3Damascus ahin, @2Chule Damascus khopia alamkai aluchang @3chu Rezin ahi. @0Kum somgup le kum nga sunga E’phraim mite kivocheh soh diu nam khat’a umthei lou diu ahitai.

@@@1Chule E’phraim mi khopi lenpen aluchang @3chu Samar’ia ahin, @2Samar’ia khopi lamkai aluchang chu @3Remali’ah chapa ahi. @1Nangman natahsan louva ahileh @2Nakichen detsah louhel ding ahi,’ @3ati gatin,” ati.
Chujouvin Pakai chun Ahaz henga thu ahinsei kit’in hitin aseiye,
“Noimigam chana thuh hihen lang vanchung sana sang hijongle Pakai na-Pathen koma melchihna khat kithumin.” ati.
Ahinla Ahaz chun, “Keiman melchihna kathuma Pakai chu kapatep lou ding ahi.” atitai.
Hijeh chun aman jong, “Ngai temuvin Vo David insung mite! Mihem suhchol jong hi mai maiya nageluva nanghon ka-Pathen jeng jong thacholsah dinga nagot’u hitam?
Hichejeh a chu Pakai ama mong mongin melchihna khat nahin peh dingu ahi. Vetan, nu-ngah khat agaiyin chapa khat ahin ding ahi, ama chu amin Immanuel kiti ding ahi.
Ama chun thilse ahot bola thilpha kilhenje ahet tengle bongnoi ha leh khoiyu bou aneh ding ahi.
Naosen chun thilse hot bola thilpha kilhenje ahetdoh kah-a hibanga naginuva amasang lhona tikihot hot’a naumu hiche leng teni hin agam hi adalhah thipdel lhon ding ahitai.
Pakaiyin nangma le namite chung chule napa insung mite chunga phat khat alhunsah ding hitobang nikho hi E’phraim miten Judah adalhah niuva pat hung lhung khalou lai hel ahi-Assyria lengpa” ati.
Hiche nikhole chun Pakaiyin Egypt vadung twikun dunga cheng thousi mutkhomin tin, Assyria gamsunga cheng khoipi jouse jong agama cheng dia akoukhom ding ahi.
Hiche ho chu aboncha komtong thuh lai laiya, songpi pohkhi kah dunga jong, saichou ling lah lah a chule hamhing lah lah a hung cheng ding ahiuve.
Hiche nikho le chun Pakaiyin luipi gala min akithalah pa leh Assyria lengte chu samchem a ajangsam avochaipeh a akeng phang mul geiya bahchea achejol ding, akhamul geiya ahinvotol jeng ding ahi.
Hiche nikho le chun mi pasal khat’in bong lagol khat le kelngoi ni bou avul jou ding,
ahivanga hiche teni hi anoitwi thalhing lheh ding ahin, hijeh a chu amapan bongnoi ha jeng aneh ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh agamsunga kidalha chan chun bongnoi ha le khoiju jeng aneh dingu ahi.
Hiche nikho le chun dangka shekel sang khat cheng man lengpigui kena mun jousea ling le khao jeng keh ding ahi.
Hikom dunga chu mihon thalpi le thalchang akichoiyuva gam lenna anei diu ahi, ajeh chu agamsung pumpi chu ling le khao dimset ding ahitai;
thinglhang gamsung ngalbu nem lah jeng jong chu ling le khao ginna navalut ngam lou dingu ahi; hiche mun chu gancha lhatna gam hungsoh doh a, kelngoite kinopsaina mun hiding ahi.
Pakai chun kajah a, “Songpheng lentah khat kilah-in lang achunga chun mipi hetthei lekhajem in, ‘Ma’hershal’al-hash’-baz’ atin jihdoh temin,” eiti.
Hichun keiman thulah theidol tah hettohsah mi thempu Uri’ah le Zechari’ah kei dinga pang dingin kaneiye.
Hichun keima themgaonu henga kaga lut’in ahileh amanu ahung gaiyin chapa khat ahin hingtai. Chuphat’in Pakai chun kajah a, “Ama min hi “Ma’her-shal’alhash’baz sah-in;
ijeh-inem itile naosen chun ‘Hepa, Henu’ tije ahet masanga Damascus haona le Samari’a thilchom dohsa chengse chu Assyria masanga kipo mang ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin kajah a thu ahinsei kit’in hitin aseiye.
“Ipijeh-inem itileh hiche mite hin Shilo’ah a twi long del del ho adeimo jeh-u leh Rezin le Ramali’ah chapa koma akiho lhul jeng nauva hin,

hichejeh tah hin vetan, Pakaiyin amaho douna hat tah le tamtah luipi dung twi jouse le Assyria lengpa leh aloupina aboncha ahin lonvuhsah ding ahin, chutengle atwilam jouse hung dimtul tula atwikul jouse achup soh hel ding,
chule Judah gamsunga jong long lut’a kitol tola achup tel tul ding, ngong geiya long ding alhaving kijaldoh teni chun nagamsung availam akho khongsoh ding ahiye, O Immanuel!” ati.

@@@1Lung gelkhom khom jong leu chun pannabei @3hintin, @2Kihou hou jong leu chun sohdoh lou @2ding ahi, ajeh chu Pathen keiho @3toh apangkhome.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai chun aban thahat chun eituh-in kajah a hi tin aseiyin chule hiche mite lamlhah kajui louna dingin nasatah-in eigih-in hitin aseiye,
“Hiche miten kidemna ahi, tia asei jouse chu kidem nan seidauvin lang, akichat chan kichat dauvin chule tijat nan neidauvin.
Thaneipen Pakai ama chubou athenga naboluva, natijatpi dingu chu amabou hi ding ahi.
Chuteng ama chu munthenga hung panga, kipalna song hi ding, chule Israel insung teni dinga jong kipalna songpia hung panga, Jerusalema chengte dinga thang le pela hung pang ding ahi.
Hiche chunga chu mi tamtah hung kipal lhu-uva, akiselhuh tengule kitat bong gamuva, thanga oh soh keiyuva kimandoh soh ding ahiuve,” ati.
Hettohsahna hi geldoh-in lang kasei juite lah a hiche danthu hi mohor namden tan.
Kenvang Jacob insunga amai selmangpa Pakai chu ngah jinging ting, ama jenga kinem inge.
Vetan, kei le Pakaiyin eipeh kachate hi Israel sunga dinga Zion molsanga chengpa thaneipen Pakaiya hung kon melchihna le mukhah lou thil kidang kahiuve.

Ijeh-inem itileh amahon najah-uva, “Doithem ho le mitphel doi themho, phuisam sama doi thu sei sei ho chu gadonguvin,” atiu chu, mipin a-Pathen adohjoh lou ding ham? Kon mihing ho khela mi thi ho adohjoh ding ham?
Danthu le hettohsahna joh doh ding ahibove! Amahon hiche thu hi sei jongu leh hichea chun khovah aumpoi.
Aman lung hesoh tah le gilkel tah a asung ahin jotpa a chule hita chu agil ahung kel tengle acham chama hung kiphina alengpa le a-Pathen ahin gaosap ding, chule hung vandah ding ahi;
leiset lang ahinvet jongle vetan, lung hesoh le muthim jeng, lung gima lung ngui chet’a um ding; muthim lhangkhal lah-a ama chu kileh lut ding ahiye.

Amavang masang laiya aman ana gaosapsa Zeb’ulun gam le Naph’tali gam lung gima anaum tasa chu lung nguiya hung umlou ding, khonung tengle aman ahin loupi sah diug ahi; Jordan gala twikhanglen lampi namtin vaipi Galilee.

Hiche nikhole chun hung hiti ding ahi: Israel mi amoh chengse le Jacob insung mi ahingdoh chengse chu asugampau chunga hung ki-ngai louhel ding, Pakai Israel Mithengpa chung joh a dettah a hung ki-ngaijo ding ahiuve.
Amoh cheng, Jacob mi amoh cheng chu Hat chungnung Pathen henga hung kile kit ding ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile namite Israel chu twikhanglen neldi jat aphah vanguvin alah a amoh cheng chubou hung kilekit ding ahi. Manthahna chu akitepsa ahitan, adih chun achupsoh ahitai.
Ajeh chu akitepna bang banga Pakai thaneipen Yahweh chun leiset pumpi jalah tah-a akikhonna hel ahinbol ding ahiye.
Hichejeh chun Pakai thaneipen Yahweh-in hitin aseiye, “Vo Ziona cheng kamite, Egypt miten nabol banguva Assyria miten mollhon le tenggola naden tengule kicha hih heluvin.
Ijeh-inem itile kalunghanna hi hung beivah ding ahitan, hitengle chun kalung sat na hi amaho chunga hungle chuh ding ahi.

Ajeh chu thaneipen Pakaiyin Oreb songpi phunga Midi’an mite aden banga chu, amaho douna mol ahin lap ding, chutta chu amoljol twikhanglen chunga hung ki jama, Egypt gama abol banga ahindop sang ding ahi.
Hiche nikhole chun hiti ding ahi, ama pohgih chu nangma lengkouva kona kidom lha a, chule anamkol jengjong na-ngong changa kona kihehbal ding ahiye.” ati.
@@@1Ai’ath a ahungin, @3Rimmon ahung galkaitai; @2Migron ahin jotpan, @1Michmash a chun athilkeo akoiye;
@@@1Gal langa agalkaiyuvin, @2Geba khoa chun ajan-geh khovah tauve; @1Ramah kho chu akitihot tan, @2Saul kho Gib’e-ah mite chu ajamtai.
@@@1Vo Gallim khosung chanu, othongin @3kap’in! @2Ngaitemin Vo La’ishah kho! @1Hiche nu hi donbut temin @2Vo An’athoth!

@@@1Chule ama chu Pakai ginna jenga bou @3kipah ding ahi. @2Aman mit vet mai maiya thu atan @3lou ding, @1Ana ajah phah mai mai jeh a @2Thu chaina anei louhel ding ahi.

@@@1Mivaichate thu chu adih jenga @3atanpeh ding, @2Leiset’a alungnemte chu kitoh tah a @3thu atanpeh ding ahi; @1Ajeh chu akamsung soh moljola chu @3leiset aden ding, @2Chule mi gilou chu akamsungsoh ahusa a @3atha ding ahi.
@@@1Adih chu ama dingin akonggah khao vin @3hung pangin tin, @2Chule kitahna chu ataigahna hungpang @3ding ahi.
@@@1Kamkei le kelngoinou hung geh khomin @3tin, @2Kei-ahsi le kelnoute hung kol khom @3ding ahiuve; @1Bongnou le sakei jeng jong kol khoma, @2Chapang neo khat’in aboncha akaihoile @3dingu ahi.
@@@1Bongpi le savom hung lha khomin tin, @2Anoute lhon jong hung kol khom ding; @1Chule Sakei jengin jong bongchal @3banga @2Changpol ahin neh jeng ding ahi.

Hiche nikho le chun Jesse bulbal chu mitin dinga ponlap’a hung kitung ding, amabou chu namtin vaipin ahin holsoh keiyuva, chule ama ngahmun chu hung loupi lheh jeng ding ahi.

Hiche nikhole chun Pakaiyin dalhah a um amite amoh chengse Assyria gama kon, Egypt gama kon, Pathros gama kon, Ethiopia gama kon, Elam gama kon, Shinar gama kon, Hamath gama kon chule twikhanglen pang dunga kona lokhomna dinga akhut anivei channa ahin lhan ding ahi.

@@@1Aman namtin vaipi dinga ponlap khat @3ahin tundoh a, @2Israel lah a paidoh a umsa jouse @3jong ahin khop khom ding; @1Leiset ning lia kona @2Judah mi kithecheh ho chu @3Ahin lokhom soh kei ding ahi.

chule hiche nikho le chun nasei dingu ahi, @1“Pakai chu thangvah-uvin lang @2Aminin taovun! @1Namtin vaipi lah-a athilbol ho hi hetsah-uvin @3lang, @2Ama min hi choiat’in aumtai, @3tin phongjal uvin.

Pakaiyin Jacob chu avoujang natpeh ding, Israel hi ahinlhen kit’a chutengle agamsung uva achensah ding, gamchom miten jong hinjop’uvin tin Jacob insung mia hung beh chah ding ahiuve.

Mitinin Israelte ahin puiyuva agamsung ma ma ahinlhut dingu, chutengle Israel insung min midang ho chu Pakai gamsunga soh pasal le soh numeiya avul dingu, soh a anakaiho chu, soh a alekaiyuva, abol gentheiyuva pangho chunga vai ahom dingu ahi.
Natna le lelna chule hahsa a nakitohsah mitea kona Pakaiyin choldona napeh nikho le chun,
@@nangman Babylon lengpa douna hiche thuchih hi napoh doh a nasei ding ahi. “I-atileh mi hutotpa umthima hita a, @2Mibol gentheinu kho ngaiya hitam!
@@@1Pakaiyin mi giloute moljol aheh bong @3tan, @2Vaihompa tenggol aheh bong tai.

@@@1Abonchauva ahin donbut’uva najah a @3asei dingu, @2‘Nang jong keiho bangin nalhasam @3lheh tan, @1Keiho bang bang nahitai!’ @2Ati dingu ahi.

@@@1Vannoi hi nelgam hisah jenga, @2Akhopi ho jong leh khup jengpa; @1Asoh chang ho inlama kitesah kit @3louhel pa chu,’ @2Ati dingu ahi.

@@@1Hiche ho toh nakivui tha louding @3ahi! @2Ijeh-inem itile nangman nagam nasu @3mangin, @1Namite jeng jong chemjamin nathat @3tai. @2“Ohe, thil gilou bol miho chilhah mite @3kimin phah kit hih hel hen!
@@@1Apateu themmona jalin achapate hi @3tha dingin gon, @2Achutiloule hung ding doh-uvin tin @3leiset chunga khopi asah dimsoh @3diu ahi,” nati ding ahi.
Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Amaho dou dinga kakipat ding, Babylon a kona aminu jong athimoh chengse jong, ason achilhah te acha anao kasat lhah ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin;
keiman amun jeng jong saphu ho chenna muna kasem ding, twikul jeng kahisah a, manthahna muntheh a katheh ngim ding ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.

Hiche nikho chuleh Egypt mite achunguva thaneipen Pakaiyin khut ajapkhum masanga kicha kitihot hot ding, numei bep hi ding ahiuve.
Chule Egypt mite dinga Judah gam chu tijat umtah hung hiya, koi hijongle akiseipohna chan chu thaneipen Pakaiyin amaho douna athil ngaito jala kicha cheh ding ahiuve.
Hiche nikho chuleh Egypt gamsunga khopi ngajenin Cannan pao athouva, thaneipen Pakaiya pang ding hung kihahsel ding ahiuve; hiche ho lah a khopi khat chu Nisa khopi kiti ding ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh Egypt gam kimlai tah a Pakai dinga maicham khat hung umdoh a, agamgia jong Pakai dinga gamgi song kiphut ding ahi.

Hiche chu Egypt gamsunga thaneipen Pakai dia melchihna le hettohsah a hung pang ding; mi bolgenthei ho jeh a Pakai henga ahung tao tenguleh aman huhhinga khat ahinsol peh a, amaho ahuh a, ahuhdoh ding ahi.

Chutengle Pakai amatah Egypt mite henga hung kiphonga, Egypt miten hiche nikho chuleh Pakai hin heuvin tin kilhaina gantha le pumgo thilto aboluva chibai ahinboh-uva, chule Pakaiya kitepna tampi ahin neiyuva hiche ho chu atoh bulhing diu ahi.
Pakaiyin Egypt mite ahin den ding, adena chuteng aboldam ding, amaho Pakai henga hung kile kit’uvin tin aman jong atao nau angaiya aboldam ding ahi.

Hiche nikho chuleh Egypt’a konin Assyria geiyin lamlen hung kilhung lut’in tin, Assyria mite Egypt gamsunga hunguva, Egypt mite jong Assyria gamsunga hung diu, chuteng Egypt mite leh Assyria miten Pathen ahoukhom diu ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh Israel hi Egypt le Assyria bana thum channa hung panga, leiset lailunga phatthei boh a hung pang ding,
thaneipen Pakaiyin phatthei aboh mite dinga chu hita aseiya, “Phattheiboh chang hen, kamite Egypt mi, kakhutsoh Assyria mi, chule kagoulo Israel mi,” ati ding ahi.
Assyria lengpa Sargonin ahinsolpa sepai lamkai pipu pen tah ahunga Ashdoh kho asat’a alah kum:

Pakaiyin Amoz chapa Isaiah kama thu ahinsei pet chun hitin aseiye, “Chen lang nataiya khaodip pon kivei chu sut lhan, nakengphang tenia konin nakeng chot teni sut lhan,” atileh; aman jong chuti chun abolin, asagoh keovin aumin chule akeng keovin lam ajot’e.
Chuin Pakaiyin aseiye, “Egypt le Ethiopia douna kum thum sunga kasohpa Isaiah asagoh keova auma akeng keova lam ajot banga,

Assyria lengpan Egypt mite leh Ethiopia mite, khangdong lai le tahse cheng abonchauva gal-hinga amat’a sohchanga akai ding, sagoh keo le kengchot beiya um diu, Egypt mite dinga jachat umtah a akongbuh teni kihohdoh ding ahiuve.
Chuphat le akinep nau Ethiopia jeh le akithang atnau Egypt jala lungthoiyuva kisu lungdong diu ahi.

Chutengle hiche twikhanglen pang dunga chengten hiche nikhoa hi hita aseiyuva, ‘Vetemin, ikineppi teu leh Assyria lengpa a kona eihuhdoh-uva eikithopi diuva eibolteu chunga ipi soh a hitam! Chule eiho ihiuvin iti ijamdoh diu hitam?’ tia asei dingu ahi,” ati.

Aman Judah kikhu khumna chu ahohdoh tai. Hiche nikho chun nangman gammang noiya insunga gal manchah ho chu naven,
chule David khopi kikhentel telna tampi ahi chu amudoh tauve; hijeh chun twikul noinunga twi jouse chu nathal khom khomuvin,
Jerusalem injat nasimuvin galkul kaikhum dingin in ho chu navochim tauve.
Chuin pal teni kah a chun twikul luiya twi kholna ding khat nasemuvin ahi. Ahinla hiche bolpa chu vejong nave pouvin masang laiya pat’a gontohsa anakoipa jong chu khoh sah-in nanei pouve.

Pakai thaneipen Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, “Chen lang insunga vaipo neichingpa Shebna henga galut’in lang chule ajah a,
’Nangman hikoma hi ipi holding naneiya chule koipen naneiya nang dinga lhan khat nakisema, chung sang lama khu lhan khat nakisema, songpi sunga khu nachenna ding nakivu ham?
Vetan, Vo mi thahatpa, Pakaiyin thahat chang sana nahinse mang ding, natom toma nahinjel doh ding;

chimpei peiya avel vela napei kimvel ding, tol lhang ong lah a kangtalum kisep banga naselhah ding ahi; hikoma chu nangma nathiden ding, naloupina kangtalai jouse jong umden ding, napupa insung chu najachatpi ding ahiye.
Keiman natohna muna konin nakaidoh ing ting, napan muna kona nakipaidoh ding ahi.
Hiche nikho chuleh keiman kasoh pa Eli’akim, Hilki’ah chapa chu kakouva
nangma leng ponchol kasilpeh ding, nakonggah chu kagah peh a, nangma thaneina chu ama khut’a kapeh ding ahi; chutengle ama chu Jerusalema chengte leh Judah insung dinga mipa a hung pang ding ahi.
Chule David insung kanglong hehna chu ama lengkouva kakhaipeh a, aman ahondoh tengle koimachan akha thei louhel ding ahi, aman akha tengle koimachan ahondoh thei louhel ding ahi.
Chujongle keiman ama chu mundet lai khat’ a thil khaina kikhenbeh banga kahendet ding, apa insung dinga ama chu jabolna laltouna hiding ahiye.
Ama chunga chu apa insung thilgih jouse, ason achilhah te leh ainsung kon chengse ahiuvin, manchah jouse khon hoa pat twi hai geiya akhai khum diu ahi.

Thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye, “Hiche nikho chuleh mundet laitah a kikhenlut thil khaina jong chu hung lhong lha ding; hung kisat lha a hung lha mang ding, achunga kikhai thilgih jong chu hung kisat lhah tha ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseitai.” ati.

Ven Chalde’a mite gam pi hi! Hiche hi mipi ahin, Assyria ahipoi, Tyre hi gamsa ho dingin akoiyuvin; khopi adelkhum nau intingvum sang ho chu anatung doh-uvin, aleng inpi mun jouse jong aphet chamuvin, kho gem asoh gamtauve.
@@@1Kap’uvin, Vo Tarshish a kong innei ho; @2Ajeh chu nakulpi akiphet theng hel @3tai.
Hiche nikho chuleh Tyre hi leng khatseh hin nikho sung banga kum som sagi jen suhmila hung um ding; kum som sagi kichai tengle chun Tyre dinga noti lasah banga hita hung um ding ahi;
@@@1“Selangdah kichoiyin lang, @2Khopi kimvela vah len vo suhmilsa @3noti! @1Tumging ngei ngei saiyin lang, la tampi @3san @2Hita chu nangma nakigeldoh kitna @3dingin,” kiti ding ahi.
Kum som sagi kichai tengle chun Pakaiyin Tyre ahung vil ding, amajong athalah nu henga hung kilekit’a, chule leiset chunga vannoi lenggam jouse toh noti chona chon ding ahi.

Ama kiveina thil jouse leh athalah nu jong chu Pakaiya hung kithenso ding, koijong kitup’a kikoi khom lou ding, ama kiveina thil ho chun Pakai angsunga chengte anneh neng jeng junga atopeh a. ponsil hoitah tah a atojoh ding ahibouve.
@@@1Vetan, Pakaiyin leiset hi ahin phet ngim @3hela akeova ahinjam ding; @2Leiset mai aloichi toa asunga chengte @3athecheh ding ahi.

@@@1Hita chu hung uma thempuho jong mipi @3bep bep hi ding, @2Soh pa bang banga chu apupa jong @3hung um ding; @1Soh nu bang banga apinu jong @3hung uma, @2Thiljoh pa bang banga thil chopa @3jong hung um ding; @1Sumpa hompa bang banga sumpa lapa @3jong hung uma; @2Sum batsah pa bang banga sumba pa @3jong hung um ding ahi.
@@@1Leiset hi keohela hung kilha a, kichom @3ngim hel jeng ding ahi; @2Ajeh chu Pakaiyin hiche thu hi @3aseitai.

@@@1Hichejeh chun leiset hi gaosap nan @3achuptan, @2Asunga chengte jong athemmonau jeh-in @3agenthei tauve; @1Hichejeh hin leiset’a chengte akihulgo @3gamuvin, @2Mihem lhomcha bou akidalhauve.
@@@1Lengpitwi alung hemin, @2Lengpigui alung hesoh-e; @1Lungthim kipah jouse alung gime.

@@@1Amahon lasah le judon atho kit @3louhel dingu ahitan, @1Khamna thei judon ho jong chu @3ajudonu akhabouve.

@@@1Khopi sunga chun ahomkeo jeng @3akidalhan, @2Kelkot jouse alom lomin akivochip @3soh tai.

@@@1Amahon O sangtah-in kipa la @3asauvin, @2Nilhum lama konin lal loupina kho @3asamuve.

@@@1Vo leiset chunga chengpa, @2Tijatna le kokhuh chule thang @3nachunga aume!

@@@1Ajeh chu nangma mi tah lel dingin @3kulpi nahi jingin, @2Angaicha geova umpa dingin agenthei @3pet le akulpin napange; @1Khopi huiya kiselna nahin, nisat @3noiya lim nahi; @2Ajeh chu duh dah beipa miden chu khopi @3huiyin pal anuh tobang ahin,
@@@1Lhang golaiya nisa sat tobang ahi. @2Nangman gamdang mite husa chu @3naphoh lhan, @1Meilom lah a nisa sat bangin @2Pannabei miho lasah chu @3athip tai.

Hiche molsang chunga hi thaneipen Pakaiyin mitin dinga golvah, atui tui jenga kivahna, lengpitwi ninga kivahna, thao jeng dimset golvah, lengpitwi ning phatah a kilhi thengsela kivahna abolpeh ding ahi.
Chule aman hiche molsang chunga hi mitin kikhu khum den chu ahodoh a, namtin vaipi kijao khum pon lukhuh chu ahodoh ding ahi.
Pakaiyin thina chu tonsot geiya din hin vallhumin tin, Pakai Pathenin mitin maiya mit lhi long jouse atheh hul peh a, leiset’a kona amite kihousetna alah mang ding ahi, ajeh chu Pakaiyin thu aseitai.

Hiche nikho chuleh hita kisei ding ahi, “Ven, hiche hi eiho Pathen chu ahi; eihuhhing theina dinguva eihon ama inga jingu ahiye. Hiche hi Pakai chu ahi, eihon ama inga jingu ahiye! ama mi huhhingna a hin eiho thanomin kipah uhite,” kitinte.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai khut chu hiche molsang chunga hi hung kingama, eh khula changpol kichon lut banga Moab chu aumna muna keng chotpha kinei ding ahi.
Alailung tah a chu aman, twiya kijap’in akhut teni ajah doh banga, akhut teni ajah ding ahi; ahinla Pakaiyin ama kiletsahna chu akhut themna puma asot lhah peh ding ahibouve.
Chule akulpi sang tah a kikai ho jong chu aloi nem peh a, nem cha akoipeh a, leivui lah tol keova ahin sot lhah jeng ding ahi.
@@@1Hiche nikho chuleh hiche la hi @2Judah gamsunga hung kisa ding ahiye. @1“Keihon khopi dettah khat kaneiyun, @2Pakaiyin huhhingna pal leh leipal @3bangin atungdoh-e.
@@@1Tahsanna nei jing nam midihho ahung @3lut theina dingin, @2Kelkot ho chu hongdoh-uvin.

Hiche nikho chuleh Pakaiyin a-chemjam hemtah le len tah chule thahat tah a Leviathan kiti gul len jamle le, Leviathan kiti gul len kiveikol ngeng ngung chu asat’a chule twikhanglena cheng dragon chu atha ding ahi.

Hiche nikho chuleh Eu-phra’tes vadunga konin Egypt vadung geiyin Pakaiyin hinjep khomin tin. Vo Israel chate, nang ho khat khat’a nakikhop khomsoh diu ahi.

Hiche nikho chuleh sumkon lentah hung kimut’in tin, chuteng leh Assyria gamsunga mang thah jouse leh Egypt gamsunga kidellut jouse hunguvin tin Jerusalem molsang theng chunga Pakai chibai ahung boh diu ahi.

Nangho dingin mu kinei hicheng hi mohor kinamden lekhabu sunga thucheng ho abang jenge. Mihon hiche lekhabu simthei khat chu gape hen lang hitin seileh, “Hiche hi sim temmo ong,” tileh; aman, “Ahithei hih-e, mohor akinamden bouve.” tinte.
Chule lekhabu chu asim thei lou khat kipe hen lang hitin kisei hen, “Hiche hi sim temmo ong,” kitileh; aman, “Keiman lekha kasim theipoi.” tinte.

Ajeh chu, Vo Ziona cheng mite leh Jerusalema chengte; nang ho naka kit louhel dingu ahitai. Nataona oginu ajah teng leh nalungset tei tei diu ahiye; ajah doh tih tih nadonbut jeng diu ahi.
Pakaiyin gimna chang lhah napeh-uva, bolgentheina twi napeh vangun, nangho mihil pan amai asel mang kit lou ding, namit tah-uva nanghon mihilpa chu namu vah dingu ahi.
Chutengleh nanung lamuva konin nanabenguva thu kisei jauvin natin, hita asei ding, nakijet hei nakivei hei tengu leh, “Lampi hiche hi ahiye, hichea hin cheuvin,” ati ding ahi.

Hiche teng chuleh nanghon dangka a kitomjol milim semthu kijempol ho le sana a kitomjol milim kilhajol chengse chu nasuh thang dingu ahi. Hichengse chu thil theng louva nathe thang soh-uva, ajah a jong, “Kitol mangin!” nati dingu ahi.
Aman leiset’a namuchi tu chu gotwi hinchap’in tin, leiset gasoh chu hung pha theiya hung thalhing ding ahin; hiche nikho chuleh nagancha jong hamhing tamna lah lah a hung lhale ding ahi.
Chule bongchal ho leh sangan ho leiset’a loukai ho jengin jong anneh tui tah tah aneh diu, changkhea kilhachila kangkuiya kikui chilsa geiya aneh diu ahi.
Mi tamtah akitha ni, intingvum jouse alhuh nikho chuleh molsang jouse leh thinglhang sang lai jousea twi lonna vadung hung longlha cheh ding ahi.

Hiche kalvala jong chu lhavah jeng jong nisa vah bang jenga, nisa vah jong ajat sagi jena vah ding, nisagi sunga avah jat kigom bang ding ahi, Pakaiyin amite kisuh khahna akhuipeh a, genthei tah a aman adena amavo na jouse aboldam ni leh chuti ding ahi.

Kut theng akiman jan banga nanghon la kisa najah dingu ahi; Pakai molsang lam, Israel Songpi phunga theile kimut ging alungthim kipah thanoma potdoh a chepa tobang nahi dingu ahi.
Chutengleh Pakaiyin alal loupi ogin chu akijah sah a, chule alungsat nasatah, mi vallhum thei meikong, le khopihui chule gel toh hung kitol lhah tha a amijepna abanjang chu akimudoh sah ding ahi.
Pakaiyin amoljola ahin den tengleh aogina chu Assyria mite kihot lhul gam ding ahiuve.
Chule Pakaiyin achunguva ahin chuh sah ding engbolna tenggola aden gin jeng jong chu khutbeh gin le selangdah gin bang ding; aman khut kilehpela akisatpi ding ahiuve.

Ijehinem itile thuh khuh khat masang peh a pat gonsa um ahitan; lengpa dinga gonsa ahi; a thing lom jong a lhuh a lhuh, alet’a len ahin, mei le thing lhingset ahiye; Pakai hai husa chu katsong luidunga long bangin akouje jun ahi.

Hezeki’ah lengpa lengchan kum som le kum li lhin kumin Assyria lengpa Sennach’erib chu Judah gam kulpi kikaikhum khopi jouse sat dingin ahung konin, abonchan ajousoh-e.
Assyria lengpa Lachish khoa konin Rab’shakeh chu sepai tamtah toh Jerusalem lengpa Hezeki’ah henga asoltan ahi. Rab’shakeh chu sahlam twikul, ponsoppa lou lampia twikai phunga chun agadinge.
Hichea chun ahenga insung vaipoa pang, Hilki’ah chapa, Eli’akim le lekhasun pa Shebna toh thuching pa, Asaph chapa, Jo’ah toh ahunguve.
Rab’shakeh chun amaho jah a, “Hezeki’ah jah a chun gaseiyuvin lang, ‘Leng len tah, Assyria lengpan hitin aseiye, “Nangma ipi chung pena kisonga hitobang loma lungdet’a kicholdo nahim?
Thucheng kisei mai mai ho nangman galsatna themna leh thahatna dana nagel ham? Tua hi koipen chunga kisonga nahiya hita hi keima neidou ham?
Ven, nangma, achunga kingaipen pen dotvang jeng thei, peng tenggol kiheh chipsa tobang Egypt chunga kisonga nahi. Egypt lengpa Pharaoh chu achunga kingai jouse dinga hi tobang chu ahiye.

Ahin nangman kajah a, ‘Keiho ka-Pathenu chunga kisong kahiuve,’ ti jongle chun; hiche Pathen chu hilouham amunsang jouse le maicham jouse Hezeki’ah-in atolmang peh a, Judah le Jerusalem jah a, “Hiche maicham masanga hin Pathen chibai boh-uvin,” tia aseipeh chu?
Hijeh chun tun khohsah tah-in kapu Assyria lengpa henga natahsa tah-in kihoutohna hung neiyin. Keiman achunga tou ding nakimu jou dinga ahileh sakol sang ni napenge.
Chuti jongle Egypt mite kangtalai ho leh sakol touthem ho chunga naki-ngai laisea kapu sepai aneopen lah a lamkai khat jeng jong iti nanungno jou ding ham?

Hiche kalval jong chun keima hiche gamsung kidoupia, asumang dinga kahung jeng hi Pakai thusah hi lou ham? Pakai chun kajah a, ‘Chetouvin lang hiche gam hi kidoupin gasu mangtan, ati.’ tin gasei tauvin.” ati.

Chuphat’in Eli’akim le Shebna chule Jo’ah chun Rab’shakeh jah a, “Lungset tah-in nasohte jah a Aramaic paovin thu seiyin, keihon hiche pao chu kahet’u ahi; hiche pal vuma um mite hetphah dingin keiho henga Judah paovin thu seida tan,” atiuleh;

Rab’shakeh chun, “Kapun thu hicheng hi nangho leh napu u kom mai maiya seipeh dinga eihinsol hiya naboluva, aeh-u kineh a, ajun twi kidona nangho toh manthah tha ding, hiche mite palvuma touho henga seipeh dia eihinsol hilouva nabolu ham?” tin aseitai.
Hiti chun Rab’shakeh jong adingin, Ogin sang tah-in Judah pao chun lhang asamin, “Assyria lengpa, lenglenpa thusei hicheng hi ngaiyuvin!
Lengpa chun hitin thu aseiye, ‘Hezeki’ah chu kilhep lhahsah hih-uvin, ajeh chu aman nahuhdoh jou lou dingu ahiye.
Hezeki’ah chun Pakaiya nakison sah dau hen lang hitin jong tida hen, “Pakaiyin thon louhelin eihuhdoh-uvin tin, hiche khopi hi Assyria lengpa khut’a kipedoh louhel ding ahi,” tin.

Hezeki’ah thu ngai hihuvin; ijeh-inem itile Assyria lengpan hitin aseiye, “Kei toh chamna kisemuvin lang kahenga hunguvin, chutile nangma lengpithei cheh nakineh-uva, natheichang ga cheh nakineh diu, natwikula twi cheh nakidon dingu ahi;
keima kahunga nangho gamsung tobang khat, chang le lengpitwi umna gam, changlhah le lengpilei tampi umna gamsung khat’a kapui mang masanguvin.
Ching theiyun, achutiloule Hezeki’ah-in hita aseiya, ‘Pakaiyin eihuhdoh nauvinte,’ tia napui mang dingu ahi. Namtin vaipi lah a apathenu koi pen chun agamu Assyria lengpa khut’a kona ahuhdoh khah am?
Hamath le Arpad miho pathen ho chu hoilamba hitam? Sepharva’im ho pathen jouse hoiya ba um hitau vam? Hiche ho chun keima khut’a kona Samar’ia khopi ahuhdoh nah am?
Hiche gam mite lah a pathen ho koipen chun keima khut’a agam ahuhdoh peh a Pakai chun keima khut’a kona Jerusalem ahuhdoh ding ham?’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Ahivangin amaho athip beh-uvin thucheng khat chan jong adonbut pouve, ajeh chu, “Hichepa khu nadonbut lou diu ahi,” tia kisei lengpa thupeh umsa ahi.

Hichun insung vaipoa pang Hilki’ah chapa Eli’akim leh lekhasun pa Shebna toh chule thu chingpa Asaph chapa Jo’ah chu Hezeki’ah henga ahunguvin, aponsil chengseu kibottel pumin Rab’shakeh thusei ho chu ahung seipeh tauve.
Hezeki’ah chun hiche hi ajahdoh phat’in aponsil abottel in atahsa tah-in khaodip pon akikhun, chuin Pakai insunga alut tai.
Chujongle aman insung vaipopa Eli’akim leh lekha sunpa Shebna toh thempu masa ho chu khaodip pon kisil pumin Amoz chapa Isaiah henga asoltai.
Amahon Isaiah jah a, “Hezeki’ah-in hitin aseiye, ‘Tuni hi hesoh nikho, beh lhah nikho chule vetda nikho ahi; ijeh-inem itile naosente apengdoh kigon, ahinla ahung pen lhah jengna diu thahat aumpoi.

Pakai na-Pathen uvin Rab’shakeh kitipa apupa Assyria lengpan Pathen Hing dai chavai dinga ahinsolpa thusei ho chu ajahna thei dingle Pakai naPathen uvin athujah chengse chu ahin beh lhah theina dingin, hijeh chun akidalha amoh chengse dingin sang tah-in taovuvin,’ tin aseiye,” agatiuvin ahi.
Hezeki’ah lengpa lhacha ho chu Isaiah henga ahung phat’uvin
Isaiah chun ajah-uva, “Napu u jah a chun hitin gaseiyuvin; ‘Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, “Assyria lengpa lhachaten keima eiphin nau thu kisei najah chengse jeh chun nangma kicha loujenin.

Vetan, keiman Sennach’erib sunga lhagao khat lhalut’ing ting, chuteng aman thuthang khat ajah a agamsung lama kilekit ding ahi; keiman agamsung lam agei tengle chemjama kalousah ding ahi,” ati’tin gaseipeh tauvin,” ati.
Rab’shakeh chu ahung kilekit’in ahileh Assyria lengpa chu Libnah khopi douna agalsat pet ahung toh khai; ajeh chu Lachish khoa konin anapotdoh tai, ti ajatai.

Hichun lengpan Ethiopia lengpa Tirha’kah chung changa thu kisei, “Nangma douna nakisatpi dingin ama ahung kontai,” tin ajatai. Aman hiche hi ajah phat’in Hezeki’ah henga sottolle ho asolin hitin aseiye,
“Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah henga chu hita nasei dingu ahi, ‘Kingaina nanei na-Pathen chun Jerusalem hi Assyria lengpa khut’a apehdoh lou ding ahi, tin kitepsah-in lang kilhep lhah sah hih beh-in.
Vetan; nangman nathujah chengse hi, itobang tah a Assyria lengpan gam jousea thil abola, amite jouse asuh manghel jeng hi tam! Nangma jong eiki huhdoh inte natim?
Namtin vaipite pathen hon amaho ahuhdoh mong hinam, kapu kapaten anasuh mangsa namtin vaipi ho, Gozan ho, Haran ho, Rezeph ho chule Telas’ser a chengte Eden mite chu?
Hamath lengpa hoilamba hita, Arpad lengpa hoilamba hita, Sepharva’im khopia lengpa hoilama um hita, Hena lengpa hoilamba hita, lvvah lengpa hoilamba hitam?’ ati tin gasei uvin,” ati.
Hezeki’ah chun sottolle ho khut’a konin lekha thot chu alan asimtai; chuin Hezeki’ah jong Pakai inlama achetouvin, hiche chu Pakai angsunga aga lham lhan aphajaltai.
Hichun Hezeki’ah Pakai henga ataovin aseiye,
“Vo thaneipen Pakai Israel Pathen, Cherubim chunga laltouna toupa, nangma nachangseh a leiset lenggam jouse chunga Pathen nahin, nangman van le leiset jong nasem ahi.
Vo Pakai, nanakhang hindon lang chule ngaitemin; Pakai namit’in hin vetan, Pathen Hing daichavai dinga Sennach’erib’in mi ahinsola athusei jouse hi.
Vo Pakai, tahbeh mongin Assyria lengpan namtin vaipi leh alenggam jouseu achomgam tai;
chule apathen jouseu jong meilhum sunga aleh lut gam tauve; ajeh chu hiche ho chu Pathen hilou ahiuvin, mihem khutsem thing le song jeng ahibouvui; hichejeh a chu amaho kisu mang ahiuvin ahi.
O Pakai ka-Pathenu, tu hin keiho ama khut’a konin nei huhhing uvin, chutileh leiset lenggam jouse hin nang bou Pathen nahi, ti ahet thei diu ahi,” ati.
Hichun Amoz chapa Isaiah Hezeki’ah henga mi asolin hitin aseiye, “Pakai Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Assyria lengpa Sennach’erib chung thudola kahenga nahung tao jeh a

Chule hiche hi nang dinga melchihna hiding ahi; tukum sunga ipi hijongle acham chama hung kehdoh chu nen lang, chule kum ni lhinna jong le hitobanga hung dondoh chu nen; chuteng kum thum lhin phat leh muchi natua aga nalo ding, lengpilei hon tampi nabola aga naneh ding ahi.
Judah insung mi ahingdoh amoh chengse noilama hung jungkho lut’in tin, chule chunglama hung gadoh ding ahi;
ijehinem itile Jerusalema konin amoh cheng aval ho chu hung umdoh intin, Zion molsanga ahingdoh hung um ding ahi. Thaneipen Pakai tom ngainan hiche hi ahinboldoh ding ahiye.

“Hichejeh chun Assyria lengpa chung chang thudola Pakaiyin hitin aseiye. ‘Ama hiche khopi sunga hi hung lut louhel ding, thalpi chang khat jong akap lou ding, lumpho amasanga jong hung kithah lou ding, adouna dinga leipal jong aset louhel ding ahi.
Ahung konna lampi ma ma kile kit ding, hiche khopi sunga hi hunglut louhel ding ahi,’ tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Ijeh-inem itile hiche khopi hi keima jeh le kasohpa David jeh a kahuhhing ding ahi,” ati.

Chuin Pakai Vantil apotdoh-in Assyria mite ngahmun chu adengin mihem sang ja khat le sang som get le sang nga a that gamtai; hiti chun jingkah a miho ahung jingtho phat’uvin, vetan, abonchan mithi long jeng anahiuve.
Chuphat’in Sennach’erib Assyria lengpa chu akipatdoh-in inlama achen Ninevah khopia acheng tai.

Aman apathen Nisroch insunga chibai aboh pet’in achapa teni Adram’melech le Share’zer-in ama chu chemjamin athat lhonin Ararat gamsunga ajamlut lhontai. Hijeh chun achapa E’sar-had’don chun ama khelin lengvai apon ahi.

Hiche lai chun Hezeki’ah adam mon thipai ding ahitai. Hichun Amoz chapa Isaiah chu ahenga ahungin ajah a, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Nainsung semtup tan, ajeh chu nangma nathi ding, nadamdoh lou ding ahitai.’ tin aseive.” ahungti.
Chuphat’in Hezeki’ah bangmai lang ngan akiheiyin Pakaiya ataovin,

chule aseitai, “O Pakai, tun keima neihin geldoh-in nahenga hung taovah kahi, keima itobang tah a kitahna lhingset le lungthim pumpia nangma angsunga lam jot kahiya, nangma mitmua itobang thilpha kanabol hitam,” atin; Hezeki’ah chu hakan akaptai.
Hichun Isaiah henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin.
“Chen lang Hezeki’ah jah a gaseitan, ‘Pakai napa David Pathenin hitin aseiyc, “Keiman nataona kajan, nalhilon jong kamutai, ven, keiman nahinkho hi kum som le kum nga kajophe peh ding nahi.
Keiman nang le hiche khopi hi Assyria lengpa khut’a kona kahuhdoh a chule hiche khopi hi kapanhu ding ahi.
“Hiche hi Pakaiya hung kon nang dinga melchihna hi ding ahi, hita chu Pakaiyin athutep thil chu ahinbol ding ahiye,

ven, keiman nisa lhumsuh, alim Ahaz chunga che kimvelsa chu kalsom kanung chonsah kit ding ahi,’ ati tin seipeh-in,” ati. Hiti chun nisa alhumsuhsa akikimvelna a konin kalsom akinung chon kit’ in ahi.
Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah-in adammo anatna kona ahung damdoh nunga alekhasut chu:

@@@1Pakaiyin keima eihuhhingin tin, @2Chuteng keihon tumging to thoa @1Pakai insunga chu kahin laiseuva @2La kasah dingu ahiye,” kati.
Isaiah chun aseitai, “Amaho chun theichangga a kisem changlhah lhon khat lauhen lang, adamtheina dingin atipat laiya khun ganu u hen,” ati.
Chuphat’in Hezeki’ah chun, “Pakai inlam jona kache touna ding chu amelchihna ipiba hiding ham?” ati.
Hichepet chun Babylon lengpa Bal’adan chapa Mero’dach-bal’adanin Hezeki’ah chu anan chule adamdoh tai, ti ajah phat’in lekha thot tampi le thilpeh apohsah-in akoma dingin palai phabep asoltai.

Hezeki’ah chun amaho ana lamton, chule amaho chu athilkholna in avetsah-in, dangka ahin, sana ahin, thil gimnamtui ahin, thao namtui ahin, agalsat manchah ahin abonchan athil kholna dunga um jouse avetsah tai. Amaho avetsah lou chu ipi thil hijongleh ainsunga hihen agamsunga hileh, khatcha jong anei tapoi.

Hichun Isaiah themgao chu Hezeki’ah lengpa henga ahungin ajah a, “Hiche miho hin najah a ipi aseiyuva chule hoilama kona nahenga hung hiuvam ?” atileh; Hezeki’ah chun “Amaho hi gamla tah, Babylon gama kona kei henga hung ahiuve,” ati.
Chuphat’in aman, “Nangma insunga amaho hin ipi pi amudoh tah-um?” atileh; Hezeki’ah chun, “Kainsunga thil um jouse amusoh keitauve, amaho kavetsah lou kathil kholna in dunga umah abeihel tai,” ati.
Chutah-in Isaiah-in jong Hezeki’ah jah a chun, “Thaneipen Pakai thusei hi ngaiyin;

vetan, na-insunga thil um jouse leh napu napaten tuni geiya ahinkhol thil ho chu aboncha Babylon gam langa akipoh mangna ding nikho ahung naitul tul’e; thil imacha kidalha lou ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chule nasung peng nachate phabep jong kikai mang ding ahi; amaho chu Babylon lengpa inpi sunga nukiso sohgam ding ahitauve,” ati.
Hichun Hezeki’ah-in Isaiah jah a, “Nangman nasei Pakai thusei chu aphabouve,” atitai. Ijeh-inem itile ama gela chu, “Keima hinlai sungin chamna le chendetna um nante” ati ahi.
@@@1“Lung monguvin, lung monguvin kamite, @2Tin na-Pathenuvin aseiye.

Pathen lim semthu mite hi imacha ahipouve, chule akipanau thil ho jong khu phatchomna aumpon ahi; amaho sakhia pang hon akijumso diu khu amuphah peh pouvin hejong ahetphah peh pouve.
Koiham pathen lim gonthua, imacha phatchomna hilouhel milim kilhahjola chu?

Ven, agol apai jouse kijumso cheh ding ahiuve, chule khut themho jong mihem ahibouvui; amaho chu hung kikhom khomu hen lang, hung ding doh cheh uhen, tija soh keiyuva chule kijumso khom cheh ding ahiuve.
Thih khengpan alim agontoh a, meihol lah a ago ap’a, chutengleh sehcha a avoh toh toh a, ban-gol thahat’a avoh a, ahung gilkel teng atha achol jin, twi adon louva ahileh lhadah jia ahi.

Thing them bolpan gol akaiya, pencil a amelchihna ajih a, thing tolnam na agong athol toh a, chuteng thil gol tena khat’a amelchih a, mihem lim bang banga agondoh a mihem mel-hoi banga ahoisah a, insunga chensah dinga agot ahi.
Aman Cedar thing ho chu aphuh lhun, kheng thing ham gangpi thing ham alhengin hiche chu gamchang thing ho lah a akhan letsah jin, Cedar thing jong aphut jin ahileh gotwiyin achap nou nou jie.

Chujou teng hiche chu mihem dingin meithingin ahung pang jin, min akeh khat akilah jin akitin aki-oijin, meiya atikong tengleh chang lhah akanna jie; hiche chu pathen limin jong asem jin chibai aboh jin, hiche ma ma chu milim kijempolin asemin, amasanga chun abohkhup jie.

Akeh khat chu meiyah atih jin, akeh lang khat saneh nan amangin, sa akigo nan oiva nan aneiye; chujongleh atahsa tah chun aki-oilumin chutengleh, “Aha, kati alumtan, meikong jong kamu mong mong tai!” tin aseijie.
Chule amoh chengse chu milimin pathen khat chun asemdoh jin, aboh khup’in chibai abohjie; chutengle akoma chun atao tao jin, “Neihuhdoh-in, ajeh chu nangma kapathen nahi!” atijie.
Amahon ahepha pouvin he jong ahekhen him him pouve; ajeh chu hiche hin amit’u achotsah tan kho amuthei tapouve, alungthimu jong ajinsah-in, hijeh chun ahekhen thei tapouvin ahi.

Koima alungthima ngaito khoh a aumpon, hetna hihen thil datkhenna hijongleh, “Akeh khat hi meiya katia, ameiam chunga changlhah kakikana, sa kakigona a kanehna sa ahitai; alang khat hi iti thet umtah thil khat’a kasemdoh ding hitam? Iti thingtum khat masanga kaboh khup ding ham?” ati theipouve.
Ama chu vutvam a kivah ahin, lungthim kihei chavaiyin apui mang ahitai; ama changseh la akihuhdoh theipon, ahilou jongleh “Kakhut jetlama hi jouthu umah hilou ham?” tin aseidoh theipoi.

@@@1Hung kumsuh-in lang leivui lah a @3hung touvin @2Vo Babylon chanu nu-ngah nu; @1Tola hin laltouna beiyin hung touvin @2Vo Chalde’a mite chanu! @1Ijeh-inem itile nangma @2Ati noudeh le ati jolsel nakiti kit @3lou ding ahitai.
@@@1Sumhei song teni kilah-in lang, @2Napon lukhuh kihodoh-in lang hin; @1Naponchol kisut lhah-in, nakeng teni @3kihodoh-in lang @2Vadung ho jong pal galkaiyin.
@@@1Nasagohkeo pi chu hung kihohdoh intin, @2Najamo jong hung kimudoh ding ahi; @1Keiman phu kalah ding, @2Pasal khat cha kahing hoi louding @3ahiye.
@@@1Keiho Lhatdampu chu amin thaneipen @3Pakai ahin, @2Israel Mithengpa ahiye.
@@@1Thipbeh chan touvin lang, chule muthim @3lah a vah lut’in @2Vo Chalde’a chanu; @1Ijeh-inem itile lenggam sung dunga @2Nangma hi nulun nakiti kit @3louhel ding ahi.

@@@1Keima kamite chunga kalung hangin, @2Kagoulo chu kasuboh tai; @1Amaho chu nangma khut’a kana pen, @2Ahinla nangin amaho chu hepin nabolpoi; @1Tehset ho geiyin nangman @2Nanamkol gihsa tah chu napohsah-e.
@@@1Nangin, “Keima tonsot geiya nulun @3kahi ding ahi,” nati’n, @2Hijeh chun hiche ho hi @1Nalungthima naching pon @2Akichaina dingu jong nageldoh poi.

@@@1Hijeh chun tun hiche hi ngaiyin, @3lungdei deiya umnom nu; @2Lung mong tah a tou touva @3nalungthima @1“Keima bou kahin, kei tobang adang @3aumpoi, @2Kei meithaiyin umdeh pongting, @3cha le nao thi jong heponge.” @4tia seinu.

@@@1Hiche thil teni hi nahenga @2Phat chomcha kah a, nikhat sunga @3naheng hung lhung ding ahi. @1Cha le nao thina, meithai na @2Lhingset’a nachunga hung @3lhung ding ahi; @1Mitphel doithemna tampi neiyin. @2Na ailhim themna tampi um @3jongleh.

@@@1Nagitlouna a jong lung mong @3tah-in naumin. @2“Koiman eimu poi,” tin naseiye; @1Nachihna le nahet nan napui @3mang ahitan, @2Chule nangin nalungthimin, @3“Keima bou kahin, @1Kei tailou adang aumpoi,” nati.

@@@1Ahinla nakiboldam thei louhelna @3ding @2Nachunga thilse hung lhung ding ahi; @1Manthah nan nahin lhun den ding, @2Hiche chu nakithoidam thei louhel @3ding ahi; @1Ima nahetphah lou, het man louhela @2Nachunga manna hung lhung ding ahi.

@@@1Nakhangdon laiya pat’a khohsah @3tah a natoh jing @2Na-ailhim themna ho le mitpheldoi @3tampi nabol chun pangin. @1Ijem itileh namolso jeng @3thei ahin, @2Tijatna tah jong nathua nung @3mai thei ahi.

@@@1Nangma naki thumop tampi chu @3nacholpi set ahitan, @2Hiche ho pi chu dindoh sah-in lang @3kihuhhingsah tangem; @1Van le van jong homkhen khena, @2ahsi ho velhi jing ho, @1Lha thah chana nachunga hung @2lhung ding sei thei ho.

@@@1Vetan, amaho chu changpol bep ahiuvin, @2Abonchan meiyin akavam ji tauve; @1Meikong thahattah lah a konin @2Amaho leh amaho akihuhdoh jou @3pouve; @1Min aki-oi dinga kito meiam dan @3ahipon, @2Amasanga touna ngam meikong @3ahipoi!
@@@1Natoh gimna chu hiche tobang @3chu ahin, @2Nakhangdon laiya pat nahin seilet @3tha peh ho chu ahiuve; @1Amaho chu amai ngat lam lama @3acheuvin, @2Nangho huhhing ding koimacha @3aumpoi.
@@@1Hiche hi ngaiyuvin, Vo Israel insung, @2Israel mina kikou ho, chule @1Judah taiguiya pengdoh ho; @2Pakai mina kihahsela chule Israel Pathen @3phongdoh ho, @1Adih le atahbeh a bol lou ho.
@@@1Ajeh chu khopi thenga konin amaho @3leh amaho akikouvun, @2Amaho le amaho Israel Pathen chunga @3apansauvin; @1Thaneipen Pakai kiti chu @2Ama min chu ahiye.
@@@1“Hichea konin thil masa chengse @3chu kaphongdoh tan, @2Hicheng chu kakamsunga kona potdoh @3ahitan hetsa kaumsah ahitai; @1Chujouvin hetman louhelin kaboltan @2Abonchan akichaisoh tai.
@@@1Nangma nalouchal’e ti keiman kahen. @2Nangongchang jong hi thih khaojang @3ahin @1Nachalpang jong sum-eng ahiye;

@@@1Masang laiya pat keiman hiche ho chu @3najah a kaphongdoh tan, @2Ahung guilhun masanguvin @1Najah a kaseidoh peh soh tai; @2Achuti louleh nangin, @1‘Hiche ho hi kalim semthu pathen @3chun asem ahin, @2Kamilim kijempol le kamilim kilhajolin @1Hiche ho hi thu apeh cheh ahi,’ @3tin seikhan nate.

@@@1“Nangman najahsa ahitan, hichu abonchan @3vetem’un, @2Chule hiche nasei phong loulai diu ham? @1Tua pat’a hi keiman thil thah thah @3jeng kajah sah ding @2Nahetkhah loulai thil kiselguh jeng @3kajah sah ding nahiuve.
@@@1Hiche ho chu tun akisemtan, asot @3hih laiye, @2Tuni nikho masanga chu najah @3khah loulai hel’u ahi; @1Achuti louleh nangman, ‘Ven, kahetsa @2jeng nahi,’ nati tah hih @3diu ham,

@@@1Nangman jajong najakha hih laiyin, @2hejong nahekha hih laiye; @1Hiche laiya pat chun nanakhang jong @3akihong hih laiye. @1Ijeh-inem itile nangman jou le nal @3jenga nabol tei ding kahen. @2Hijeh a chu napen lhah a pat doumah @3bolpa nakiti ahitai.
@@@1“Keima min gelkhoh nan kalunghan @3kakhelin, @2Keima eikivahchoina kakhohsah jehin @3nang din katuh tangpeh-e; @1Hita chu nang jeng jong @2Kasat lhah louna dingin.
@@@1Vetan, dangka tobang ahilou vangin @3nangma kasemjol tai, @2Bolgentheina meilhum sung tobanga @3nangma kapatepsa nahitai.
@@@1Kei kikhohsah mong monga hiche hi @3Kabol ahi; @2Ajeh chu itidola kamin chu suhboh @3a um ding ham? @1Keiman kaloupina chu @2Midang kapeh louhel ding ahi.
@@@1Vo Jacob, chule kakousa Israel @3kathu ngaiyin! @2Keima hi Ama chu kahin, @1Keima Amasa le Anukhah kahi.
@@@1Keima khut’in leiset bulpi @3aphutdoh-in, @2Kakhut jetlam hin van hi ponpha @3apha ahi; @1Aboncha hi keiman kakouva ahileh @2Hung ding khom jeng ahiuve.

@@@1“Nabonchauvin hung kikhomuvin lang @3hung ngaiyuvin! @2Alah-uva koi penin hiche ho hi @3aseiphong khah am? @1Pakaiyin amapa chu alungset’e; @2Aman Babylon chunga alung ngaito @3ahinbol ding, @1Aban thahat chu Chalde’a mite @2Douva hung pang ding ahi.
@@@1Kei mong mongin thu kaseiya amapa @3chu kakou ahitan, @2Keiman Jacob kahin puidohna lamdola @3hi ama khangtou ding ahi.

@@@1Neihin nailut’uvin lang hiche hi @3ngai temuvin, @2Thilsem kipat tila pat keiman guhthimin @3thu kasei khapoi; @1Thil ahung umdoh a pat keima hikoma @3chu anaumsa kahi,” ati. @2Chule tun Pakai Pathenin keima leh @3Alhagao eisoltai.
@@@1Hitin aseiye Pakai, Nalhatdampu, @2Israel Mithengpan; @1“Keima Pakai na-Pathen kahin, @2Naphatchom chomna ding nahilpa @1Nachena ding lampia napuile pa @3chu kahi.
@@@1O kadeh, nangman kathupeh ho chu ngaisah @2a nanei anahitave leh ong! @1Chutileh nang dia chamna chu vadung @3long bangin tin, @2Chujongle nadihna jeng jong @1Twikhanglen kidil bang ding ahi;
@@@1Nachilhah jong neldi jat phan tin, @2Nason nachilhah ho chu changpah @3jat pha ding; @1Keima masanga kona amaho min chu @2Itih chana jong kisat lhalou ding, @3suhmanga umlou ding ahi,” ati.

@@@1Babylona konin potdoh-uvin lang, @2Chalde’a mitea konin jammang un. @1Hiche hi kipana ogin thongin @3seiphonguvin samleuvin; @2Leiset kol kimvela lhutsoh-uvin lang, @1“Pakaiyin alhacha Jacob chu alhatdoh @3tai!” tin seiyuvin.
@@@1Pakaiyin neldi gamsung jotpaiya apui jong @3chun amaho adangchah pou ve, @2Songpia konin amaho dingin aman twi @3aputsah-in ahi; @1Aman songpi chu akehson ahileh @2Twi ahung kikhodoh jenge.
@@@1“Mi giloute dingin chamna aumpoi,” tin @3Pakaiyin aseiye. @2Pakai Lhachapa chu namtin vaipi khovah @3hi ding ahi.
@@@1Twikhanglen panga cheng hon kathusei @3ngaiyuvin, @2Gamla tah a kon miten nanakhang @3hinsungu vin; @1Pakaiyin naobu sunga kona einakou ahitan, @2Kanu tahsa a kauma chu kamin @3anasah ahitai.
@@@1Aman kakamsung hi chemjam hemtah @3bangin asemin, @2Abanjang le noiya einasel ahiye; @1Aman thalchang kinol-hem bangin @3einol hemin, @2Alivathei sunga keima einasel mange.
@@@1Chule aman kajah a, “Nang hi kalhacha @3nahin, @2Israel nang jeh a eikichoian ding @3ahi,” ati.

@@@1Ahin keiman, “Phatchomna beiya na @3katoh ahitan, @2Imacha louleh pannabeiya katha hangsan @3kasuhmang ahitai; @1Ahivangin kathudihna chu Pakai koma @3a um jingin, @2Kagim man chu ka-Pathen koma aum @3jingnai,” kati.

@@@1Chule tun hitin aseiye Pakai @2Naobu sunga pat alhacha pang dinga @3eihin gongdoh pa, @1Hita chu Ama koma Jacob lepui kit @3ding leh @2Ama henga Israel akikhop khom kitna @3dinga; @1Ajeh chu Pakai mitmun keima eikijabol @3tan, @2Hijeh chun ka-Pathen chu keima @3thahat’in apang tai.

@@@1Aman aseiyin, “Nangma kalhacha @3nahung pana @2Jacob phung jouse natundoh a @1Israel lhentum nathahsem doh ding hi @2Thil bailam chabou ahiye; @1Mi kahuhhingna hi leiset kol kimvela @3alhunsohna dinga @2Namtin vaipi dinga nangma hi khovah @3a kapansah ding nahi,” ati.

@@@1Hitin aseiye Pakai Israel Lhatdampu le @3Mithengpan, @2Namtin vaipin donlou dailouva akoiya @3ahotbolpa @1Vaihomte lhachapa chu; @2“Leng jousen muvin tin hung kipatdoh diu, @1Leng chapaho hung bohkhup ding ahiuve; @2Tahsan umtah Pakai, Israel @1Mithengpa Nangma nakilhendoh pa jala @3chu,” ati.

@@@1Pakaiyin, hitin aseiye, @2“Lunglhai pet’in keiman nangma kahouvin, @1Huhhing nikhon nangma kapan pie; @2Keiman nang hi kanachin jinga @1Mipi dinga kitepna tobanga kapeh nahin, @2Chuta chu gamsung nachendoh sahna @3ding leh @1Gou dalhahsa chu Nahomtoh pehna ding;

@@@1Songkul lut ho jah a, @2‘Hung potdoh tauvin,’ natia, @1Muthim lah a umho jah a, @2‘Hung kilahdoh-uvin,’ natina dingin. @1Amahon lampi vel dunga neh kihol @3leuvin tin, @2Molbuh chai lai laiya jong amaho neh @3thei hamhing tobang um ding;

@@@1Amaho gilkel louhel diu, dang jong @3dangchah lou diu, @2Khohui savet vut’in amut khah lou diu, @3nisan jong akah lou diu ahi; @1Ijeh-inem itile amaho lainatpi pan @2Apuile ding, twinah dung dunga @3apuile ding ahi.
@@@1Keiman molsang jouse aboncha lampia @3kasemdoh a @2Chule kalhang lamlen aboncha kisemsang @3cheh ding ahiuve.
@@@1Ven, hicheng hi gamla tah a kona @3hunguva, @2Chule vetan, hicheng hi sahlam le @3lhumlama hungkon, @1Chujongle hicheng hi Syene gama kona hung @3ding ahiuve,” ati.

@@@1Vo van, kipah-in la san, @2Vo leiset kichoi sangin; @1Vo molsang jouse kipah-in la hinsa @3soh keiyuvin! @1Ajeh chu Pakaiyin amite alhamon tan, @2Akibol gentheina chunga dip damna @3aneipeh ding ahi.
@@@1Ahivangin Zion chun, @2“Pakaiyin eidalha tan, Ka-Pakaiyin eisumil @3tai,” ati.

@@@1“Numeiyin anaosen noichep pet chu @3asuhmila @2Hita chu anaobua peng achapa chung a @3dip damna neilouva um ding dam?” ati. @1Hiche ho chun sumil jong sumil jeng @3theiyun tin, @2Kenvang nangma kasuhmil louhel ding nahi.
@@@1Vetan, keiman kabanjang tenia hin @3nang lim kajih doh-in, @2Napal jouse jong kamaiya akilang @3jing jenge.
@@@1Nangho insa a pang hon nasugam mite @3chu nasuleng jenguvin, @2Nachom gamuva pang ho nanga konin @3apotdoh tauve.

@@@1Khodah-in lang nakimvel vetemin, @2Amaho akikhomuvin nahenga ahunguve. @1Pakaiyin keima kahing jingnai, @2Nangin amaho hi kijepna nanei ding, @1Abonchauva chu mounu kikan chah bang a @2Nakan chah ding ahi.

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile nangma mun aong lai @3jouse leh dalhah thip lai jouse, @2Chule nagam dalhah thip lai jouse @3jong chu @1Hita chu nasunga cheng ho dinga naneo @3behseh jeng ding, @2Nabah gama pang ho chu gamla tah a kitol @3mang ding ahiuve.
@@@1Pul douva naum pet’a nahin nachaten @3nanakhang tenia chu @2‘Kei dingin amun hi aneo behseh jenge, @1Kachenna ding mun Neisempeh-in,’ ati @3dingu ahi.

@@@1Chutengle nangman nalungthima, @2‘Hiche ho hi koipenin eihinpeh ham? @1Keima pul douvin kana umin, cha hing @3louvin kachingme; @2Sohchangin eikikaiyin eikithah mang @3tame, @1Hiche ho hi koipenin ahinvah doh @3ba ham? @2Vetan, kei changseh eina kidalhan @3ahibou me, @1Hoilam pena kona Hiche ho pi hi @2hunguva ham?’ nati ding ahi,” @3ati.

@@@1Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, @2“Vetan, keiman namtin vaipi chunga @3kakhut kadom sangin, @1Mitin henga kaponlap kadom sange; @2Chutengleh amahon nachapate angsunga @3kipom uvin tin, @1Nachanute hi amahon @2Alengkou uva akitot dingu ahi.

@@@1Lengho napanon hung panguvin tin, @2Alengnu jouseu jong chu nadonnua hung @3pang diu; @1Tola amaiyu asuhlut’uva nahenga hung @3bohkhup diu, @2Chule nakeng phang tenia leivui chu @3ahin le-ngim diu ahi. @1Chutengle nangman Keima hi Pakai kahi @3nahetdoh ding, @2Keima eingah jing ho chu jachatna @3kichuhsah lou ding ahiuve,” ati.
@@@1Athahatpa a kona aneh ban chu @3kisalhah peh jou monga, @2Midih-in sohchanga akai chu kichu @3lhah peh theiyam?

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin hitin @3aseiye, @2“Mi thahatpan sohchang akai ho jong @3kilah peh ding, @1Pumhat’a vaihompa neh ban jong kisalhah peh @3ding ahi; @2Ajeh chu nangma nakinahpi chu keiman @3kakinahpi ding, @1Chule nachapate chu @2Keiman kahuhhing ding ahi.

@@@1Nangma nabol gentheiya pang ho chu @2Amaho tahsa ma ma kanehsah ding, @1Jukham banga amaho @2Thisan ma ma adonkham set diu ahi. @1Chutengle tahsa a hing jousen @2Keima hi Pakai kahiya nangma @1Huhhingpa kahi Nalhatdampu, @2Jacob dinga Mithahatpa kahi ahet @3dingu ahi.” ati.

@@@1Pakaiyin hitin aseiye. @2“Nanu u kidana lekha keiman ka @1Jana chu hoiya um tam? @2Ahiloule kaleibate koipen koma chu @3nangho kajoh doh nahiu hitam, @1Vetan, nathemmo jeh-uva nangho @3kajoh doh nahitauve. @2Chule nangho suhkhel jeh a, @1Nanu u chu anakida ahitai.

@@@1Ipi dinga keima kahung pet’a chu @2pasal khat beh ana um lou ham? @1Ken kahin koupet’a chu koima eidonbut @3ding ana umlou ham? @2Alhatdam joulouna dinga kakhut chu @3kisuchoma hitam? @1Ahiloule ken ahuhdohna ding thahat @3kaneilou ham? @2Vetan, keiman kaphoh-in twikhanglen @3kakansah-in, @1Vadung jouse jong neldi gam kaso @3sah-e; @2A-nga jouseu jong twi umlou jeh-in @3anamse gamin @1Dangchah-in athigam tauve.
@@@1Keiman van ho jong khu ponvom kasilpeh @3jin, @2Chule khaodip pon chu akhunan kamang @3jin ahi.” ati.

@@@1Pakai Pathenin keima hi akihil themsa @3ho leigui eibu peh-in, @2Hita chu athacholpa chu thuseiya vah @3hingle kahetna dingin, @1Ajingkah sim ajingkah seh-in akihil @3ho thu ngai na dingin @2Aman kanabeng hi asuthou vin, @3atilkhou jinge.
@@@1Pakai chun kanabeng ahong tan, @2Keima doumah bolin kanapang pon, @3nung jong kanung chon poi.
@@@1Mideng hat ho chu katung tun @3kado peh-in, @2Chule kabengmul botchai ho chu kangeiphe @3teni kado peh-e; @1Jumso dingle chil setkhum dingin @3jong @2Kamaichang kasel mang deh poi.
@@@1Ajeh chu Pakai Pathenin eipanpin. @2Hijeh chun eikisulung dong khapoi; @1Chuti ahijeh chun kamaichang hi meituh @3song bangin kadoi. @2Ijeh-inem itile eikijumso louhel @3ding keiman kahei;
@@@1Them eichansah dingpa chu ahung @3naiye. @2Koipen ham eikinahpi ding chu? @1Eiho dingdoh cheh-u hite, @2Keima kidoupi chu koipen ham? @1Ama chu kakoma hung lut hen.
@@@1Vetan, Pakai Pathenin keima eipanpi, @2Koiham themmo eichansah ding chu? @1Ven, abonchauva hi ponjela kijeldoh @3ding ahiuvin, @2Nget’in aneh gam dingu ahi.
@@@1Nangho lah a koipen chun Pakai @3agina @2Ama lhachapa thusei angaiyam. @1Vah beiya muthima vahle le pa @2Ahivanga Pakai mina tahsan jinga, @3a-Pathena kingai jingpa chu?

@@@1Vetan, nachan cheh-uva mei kidet’a, @2Meisel alom loma kidet ho! @1Nameivah-uva vah leuvin lang @2Meisel alom loma nadetnauva chun @3kitolun! @2Kei khut’a kona namu dingu chu @3hiche hi ahin, @1Thohgim tah a nakijam dingu @3ahiye.
@@@1Kathusei ngaiyuvin adih del tea, @2Pakai holle le ho; @1Nakikhet lhahna songpi leh @2Naki khoidohna song chu veuvin.
@@@1Napau Abraham leh nahingnu @3Sarah veuvin, @2Ajeh chu ama changseh ahipet’a @3kakouva @1Ama phatthei kanaboh a @2Chule mi tamtah kahisah ahitai.

@@@1Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Zion hin @3lhamonin tin, @2Chuche mun dalhah thip’a umlai @3jouse alhamona @1Agammang lah jong chu Eden banga @3asem ding, @2Aneldi gamsung chu Pakai honlei banga @3abol ding ahi; @1Asunga chun kipana leh thanopna @3kimuntin, @2Thangvahna leh kipa lasah gin kija @3ding ahi.
@@@1Kathu ngaiyuvin kamite, @2Chule nanakhang hindouvin kanam mite; @1Ijeh-inem itile keiya kona danthu @3hung potdoh a @2Chule kathutan dihna chu mitin dinga @3khovah a hung pang ding ahi.

@@@1Kadihna chu ahung kikhin naitul tulin, @2Mi kahuhhingna ahung potdoh tai; @1Chuteng kabanjang tenin mitin dinga @3vai ahom ding @2Twikhanglen pang dung min jong keima @3eingah-uvin @1Chule keima ban thahat chu @2Amahon akineppiu ahiye.

@@@1Khodah-uvin lang van lam veuvin @2Chutengle noilama leiset hi veuvin; @1Ajeh chu van jong hi meikhu banga @3kitolmang ding, @2Chule leiset hi ponjela kijel @3doh a @1Chutengle asunga cheng ho chu @2Khoinoute banga thi gam ding ahiuve; @1Amavang keima mihuhhingna chu um @3jing jenga @2Kadihna jong chun beitih anei lou @3ding ahi.
@@@1“Adih hethem ho chun kathu ngaiyuvin, @2Alungthima keima danthu cheng @3jing miten, @1Mihemte seisetna ging hih-uvin, @2Ami houset jalun lung thoi @3hih-un.

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile amaho chu ponsil @3banga lungin aneh gam diu, @2Samul pon banga lungtolin aneh @3chai ding ahiuve; @1Ahin keima dihna chu atonsot @3geiya um jing jenga, @2Chule kami huhhingna chu akhang @3khanga um jing ding ahi.” ati.

@@@1Hung thouvin, hung thouvin thahat @3hin kivon temin. @2Vo Pakai banjang; @1Masang laiya bang chun khang che @3masa chengse chu @2Hung thoudoh temuvin. @1Rahab sat tel jeng jung chu nang @3nahi hilou ha, @2Dragon tenga dot pai pai chu @3nang nahilou ham?
@@@1Twikhanglen anakan got sah chu nang @3nahilou ha, @2Twipi thuhtah kan-got sah jeng @3chu? @1Lhatdam chate galkaina dinga @2Twikhanglen tong laitah lampi @3sosah pa chu nahi louham?

@@@1Chutengleh Pakaiyin alhatdamsate @3chu hung kile kit’uvin tin, @2La asah-uva Zion lama hung @3kijot ding ahiuve; @@@1Alubuh-uva tonsot kipana hung @3chongin tin, @2Amahon kipana leh thanopna akimu @3diu; @1Gimna leh thoh hahsa chu @2Jam mang ding ahiye.
@@@1“Keima hi Ama chu kahin, nangho @3lhamonji pa chu kahi; @2Nang koi nahiya athi thei mihem, @1Hamhing tobanga kisem mihem chapa @3Nakichat ham?

@@@1Nangman nasumil tai Pakai, @3nangma Nasempa, @2Van jong ponbuh sona songdoh pa, @1Leiset bulpi khom jouse phutdoh pa, @2Chule ibola nilhum lhuma mi @3bolgentheipa @1Lunghan chu nagin jing jeng ham, @2Pakai mi sumang dinga ahung @3kigot teng? @1Mi bolgentheipa @2Lunghanna chu hoilamba hitam?
@@@1Akison kunpa chu kilhakang @3vah ding, @2Ama chu thi jong thi louva @3lhankhuh @1Ajotsuh jeng lou ding, @2Chule hai jong haisam lou ding @3ahi.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itile keima Pakai, @3na-Pathen kahin, @2Twikhanglen jeng jong nuh ling jia @1Chutengleh twidil thongje jua @3lhapa, @2Thaneipen Pakai kiti chu @3Ama min ahiye.

@@@1Chule keiman nakam sunga kathu @3jouse kakhumin, @2Nangma jeng jong kabanjang lim @3noiya kasel nahi; @1Van jong ponbuh son bangin kasongin, @2Leiset khom bulpi jong kaphutdoh-e; @1Chule Zion jah a jong chun @2‘Nangma kamite nahi,’ kati,” ati.

@@@1Hung thoudoh mong mongin, hung @2thoudoh mong mongin @1Vo Jerusalem, hung dingdoh tan; @2Nangman Pakai lunghanna khon chu @1Pakai khut’a konin nadontai. @2Lungvaina khon chu @1Atoneng geiyin nadon vaset tan ahi.
@@@1Jerusalem puile ding khatcha aumpon, @2Ahinsa achapate lah a khat cha @3umpoi; @1Jerusalem vah dohsa achapate lah @3a hin @2Akhut’a kaile ding khatcha beh @3aumpoi.
@@@1Hiche thil ni hi nachunga hung @3lhunga ahitan, @2Koiham nangma nalung hempi ding chu? @1Suhgamna le suhmangna ahin, @2Gilkelna le chemjam thahat ahin, @1Koipen ham nangma @2Nalhamon ding chu?
@@@1Nachapa jouse la alhadah gam tan, @2Sapeng thanga oh bangin @1Amaho kholai lampi bul jousea akijamuvin, @2Abonchauva amaho hi Pakai lunghan @3dimset ahiuvin, @2Na Pathen phosalna dimset ahiuve.
@@@1Hichejeh chun hiche hi ngaiyin, @3nang bolgentheiya umpa, @2Ju ahilou vanga khamna thei @3donkhamset pa.

@@@1Amite ding khohsah a Pakai na-Pathen @3chun hi tin aseiye; @2“Vetan, keiman lungvaina khon chu @1Nangma khut’a konin kala mang tai; @2Keima lunghanna khon chu @1Nangman nadon kit louhel ding ahitai;

@@@1Hiche chu keiman nangma bolgima pang @3ho khut’a kakoiya, @2Nangma jah a, ‘Kunin nachunga @3lamjot’inge,’ tia seiho; @1Chujongle nangman natung tun chu @3tollhang nabahsah-in, @2Amahon ajot galkai theina dinguvin @3kholai lamlen nabahsah-in @4ahi,” ati.

@@@1Vo Zion, thoudoh-in, thoudoh-in, @3nathahat’in hung kivonin; @2Vo Jerusalem khopi theng, naponsil @3hoitah kisil temin; @1Ijeh-inem itile cheptan lou ho leh @3aboh jouse chu @2Nasunga hunglut kit louhel ding ahitai.
@@@1Hung thoudoh-in lang, leivui chu @3kithin ngim jengin @2Vo sohchang Jerusalem; @1Vo sohchang Zion chanu, @2Nangonga nakihenna khao ho chu @3sut lhamin.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Nangho pannabeiya kijohdoh nahiuvin, chule sum beihela kilhatdoh ding nahiuve.
Ajeh chu Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, ‘Kamite chu amasan Egypt gama khopem dingin anacheuvin, chuin Assyria miten imacha hilouvin anabol genthei tauve.
Chule tua hi keiman hikoma ipi kasei ding ham, kamite imacha louvin akikai mange, avaihomteu la amao maovun, nilhum lhumin keima min jong nahsah mon akibole.
Hichejeh chun kamiten keima min hi hin heteiyun tin, hichejeh a chu hiche nikho chuleh thuseiya chu Pakai kiti Keima kahiya, hikoma kaum jing hi ahettei dingu ahi,” ati.

@@@1Molsang chungvuma ding kipana thupha @3hinpo pa @2Kengphang teni chu itihoi hoiya hoi @3hitam @1Kipana thupha hinpoa chamna thu phongle pa, @2Huhhingna thu phonglea Zion jah a, @1“Na-Pathenin lengvai apoi,” @2Tia seile pa chu!
@@@1Samu hen, nakho-ngah ho chun @2Ogin sangtah-in samu hen; @1Kitha khat tah-in kipa la sau hen, @2Zion jona Pakai ahung kilekit chu @1Amahon amit mong monguvin @2Amusoh kei tauvin ahi.
@@@1Jerusalema aongkeova um lai jousen @2Kipa la hinsa khomuvin; @1Ajeh chu Pakaiyin amite alhamon in, @2Jerusalem jong alhatdam tai!
