@@@1Kihei mangun, kihei mangun, hichea @3konin potdoh-uvin, @2Thilboh chu tongkha hih heluvin; @1Alah-a konin potdoh-uvin lang @2Nangho le nangho jeng jong kisuthenguvin @1Nangho Pakai ding thilkeo manchah ho @2Polea pang jouse.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itile nangho napotdoh phung @3jeng lou diu, @2Jam jong najam lou dingu ahi; @1Ajeh chu Pakai chu namasang uva chea, @2Israel Pathen chu nanung uva hung @3pang ding ahi.
@@@1Vetan, kalhachapa chu hung khangtouvin tin, @2Choisanga hung uma hung kidomsang ding; @1Hita chu hasan sana @2Hungsang ding ahiye.

@@@1Hita chu aman namtin vaipi tamtah @3alungdonsah ding, @2Ama jeh a leng hon jong akam akisip @3diu ahi; @1Ijeh-inem itile ajah-uva kisei khalou @3hel chu amudiu ahin, @2Ajah khah loulaiyu chu ahetkhen @3dingu ahiye.
@@@1Keiho thujah tahsan’a koi hiya, @2Chule koipen henga Pakai banthahat @3kiphongdoh tam?
@@@1Ama chu amasanga hamdon bangin ahung @3dondoh-in, @2Tolgoa adon momdoh bangin ahung @3momdoh-e; @1Eihon ivetnom dinguvin gong hoile mel-hoi @3jong apupon, @2Eideichat theiyu mel-hoi jong apupoi.

@@@1Ama chu mihemten not thap le don @3louvin akoitauvin, @2Gim genthei dimset mihem hesohna dimset pa, @1Mihemte vet ngam louhela kikoipa chutoh @3abang tan, @2Amapa not thap’in akikoiyin, eihon @3jong ama imachan igel pouve.
@@@1Tahbeh mongin aman eiho hesohna tin @3cheng apon, @2Igimna jouseu apomangtai; @1Ahinla eihon ama chu Pathenin aengbola @2Adena abolgenthei danin igeljo tauve.

@@@1Hijongleh ama chu eiho suhkhel chengse @3jeh-in akimavon, @2Eiho themmo chengse jalin ama akisu @3gep tai; @1Ama chunga chun eiho kithoidamna engbolna @3chu achu tan, @2Chule ama kijepna chengsen eiho @3eidamsah tauve.
@@@1Eiho ibonchauva kelngoi banga vahmang @3gam ihitauvin, @2Ibonchauva ama ama deilam cheh a kihei @3cheh ihitauve; @1Hiti chun Pakaiyin eiho themmona @2Abonchan ama chunga alhut tai.

@1Thaotwi choiyin Molech doiphunga @3nachen, @2Thao nasu nam let lut jeng jin; @1Nangman napalaiho chu gamla tah a @3nasol mangin, @2Noimigam geiyin nasollhan ahi.

@@@1Koipen tah nakichat’a nagin leh jou @3nasei hiya, @2Keima neigeldoh louhel ham? @1Gel haicha jong neigel louhel ham? @2Phat sotpi hi lungmong tah a kana @3um jeh a neigin lou hilou ham?

@@@1Natao teng jongleh milim nasem @3khom letlut ho chun @2Nangma nahuhdoh jengu hen! @1Aboncha chu khopi huiyin apoh manga, @2Husa khat’in aboncha alhoh mang @3diu ahi. @2Amavang keiya kisel pan gam leiset @3alo ding, @1Chule keima lhang theng chu alo @3ding ahi.
@@@1Chutengleh hita kisei ding ahi. @2“Leipal sep sanguvin, lei pal sep @3sanguvin. @1Lamlen ding chu semtoh uvin, @2Kamite lamlhah a kipalna thei @3jouse toldoh-uvin.” kitinte.

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile hitin aseiye, @2Mi chungnung, choisanga umpa, @1Amin jong Atheng kitipan; @2“Keima chungsang, munthenga kachengin, @1Lung khela lhagaova lungnem mi @3toh kacheng khom e; @2Mi lungnem lhagao suh hal peh @3ding leh @1Lung khel mi lungthim suh hal @3peh dingin.

@@@1Ajeh chu keima aitih a kalung himo @3jing jeng lou ding, @1Phat tina kalunghan jing jeng @3lou ding ahi; @2Ijeh-inem itile lhagao chu keiya @3hung kondoh ahin, @1Chule hinkho jouse haina husa hi @3keima semsa ahi cheh-e.

@@@1Keiman lamlhah jouse jong kamutai, @3hijongle kadamsah ding, @2Kapuiya kithuh bep’a kalhamon ding ahi; @1Alhasetpi chengse dinga jong, @2Akauva akam cholmanu kasemdoh peh @3ding ahi.

@@@1Amavang mi giloute chu twikhanglen @3kidil tobang ahiuve. @2Ajeh chu twi kidil chu kicholdo @3theiji lou ahi: @1Chule twipinjong bonlhoh le atheng @3lou jeng a nuh doh jin ahi.
@@@1Ka-Pathenin, ‘Migiloute dingin @2Chamna aumpoi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
@@@1Kho samin, na-ogin nemsah hih helin. @2Na-ogin sangtah-in samin lang sumkon @3gin toh bahsah-in: @1Kamite henga asuh khelnau gaphongin @3lang, @2Jacob insung jah a achonsetnau @3gaphong in.

@@@1Hijeng jongleh amahon nisim niseh-in @2Keima eihol jinguvin, @1Keima lampi jouse hetding atha nom @3uvin ahi; @2Thildih bol nam mite tobang le @1A-Pathenu thupeh chondan jouse @2Sumil louhel mite bangin aumuve; @1Amahon thu adih-a kitan thudol keima @3eidong uvin, @2Pathen nailam ding athanom uve.

@@@1‘Ibola keihon an ka-ngoluva nangman @3neimupeh louvu ham? @2Ibola keiho kineosah kahiuva nangin @3neihet peh louvu hitam? @1Vetan, nanghon an na-ngol niu chun @2Nangma deicheh nahol jouvin. @1Nangho natong jouse chu @2Nabol genthei uvin ahi.
@@@1Vetan, kinahna ding leh kisatna ding @2Tin hemtah tah a kikhotto dinga an @3ngolji nahi bouvui. @1Tuni nikhoa na an-ngol tobangu hin @2Chung gama na oginu kijah phah @3sah ponte.

@@@1Hitobanga an ngolna dinga hi @2Keiman nikho khat mihem kineosahna @3dinga kalhen ham? @1Min alu akhai khut’a ting phung @3jela akijela @2Chule khaodip pon akikhuh a vutbol @3lah-a lum ding ham? @1Nangman hiche chu an ngol ahi nati @3ding hiya, @2Pakai dinga santhei tah nikho ahi @3nati ding ham?

@@@1Keiman kalhendoh an ngol ding chu @2Gitlouva kigahna jouse sut lhah @3ding, @1Namkol khao jouse jong lhap lhah ding, @2Bolgentheiya umte chamlhat sah @3ding @1Chule namkol kitijouse @2Sut lhah soh ding hi hilou ham?
@@@1Nachang lhah agilkel ho toh kihop’a, @2Inbei ho na insunga hin puilut ding, @1Asagoh keova umpa namu tengleh @3ponsil silpeh a @2Nakisel manga namihempi nadonda lou @3ding hilou ham?

@@@1Chutileh navah chu jing khovah @3bangin hungvah lhan tin, @2Chutengle nadamna chu twisam banga hung @3putdoh loi ding; @1Nadihna chu na-masanga lamkaiyin tin, @2Pakai loupina chu nangma nung lama @3hung pang ding ahi.

@@@1Chuteng nangman Pakai chu nakouva @2Aman nahin hou ding; @1Nangman kho samin natin, @2Aman ‘Hikoma kaume’ ati ding ahiye. @1“Nangma najalah a pohgih namkol chu @3nasuh manga, @2Khutjunga kichiuko na leh thu gilou @3sei nangah a ahileh,
@@@1Agilkel dinga nakipum sunlhah jenga @2Bolgentheiya um chu na-oiva sah a @3ahileh. @1Chuteng muthim lah a konin navah hung @3vahdoh intin, @2Namuthim lai jong chu sun changlai @3bang ding ahi.

@@@1Chule Pakaiyin nangma tang louvin @3napuile jingin tin, @2Nadeichat thil apha pha navah va @3ding ahi; @1Chujongleh nagu nachang jouse thahatsah @3intin, @2Twi kichapnou jing honlei nabah ding, @1Atwiput jong kang khalou hel jeng @2Twinah phung tobang nahi @3ding ahiye.

@@@1Chule nathillui asesa chengse chu @3kisathah kit’in tin, @2Nangman khanggui tamtah bulpi naphudoh @3kit’a, @1Akeh lai jouse sempha pa nakiti ding, @2Kholai dung jouse chenna theiya thah @3semphatpa nakiti ding ahi.

@@@1Nangman cholngah nikhoa nakengphang @3natuh tanga, @2Keima nitheng nia nalungdei nabolda, @1Cholngah nikho chu kipa nikho ahi @3natia, @2Pakai choldo nikho chu jatah a nabol a; @1Nangma lampi jenga chelouva, cholngah @3nikho najabola @2Nangma lunglhaina jeng hol louva, @3imacha louva gel louva nauma @4ahileh,
@@@1Pakaiya nakipa thanop ding, @2Keiman nangma leiset chung sang lai @3jousea katousah ding; @1Napa Jacob gouva chu nangma kavah @3ding nahi, @2Ajeh chu Pakai kamsungin thu aseitai,” @3ati.
@@@1Vetan, Pakai khut chun mi ahuhhing @3thei louna dingin @2Akisuchom deh hih laiyin; @1Chule anakhang jong kho ajah @3thei louna dingin @2Angong kha hih laiye;
@@@1Amavang nathemmona chengseuvin @3nangho leh @2Na-Pathenu kikah a kikhenna asemdoh a, @1Nachonset hou chun nangho dinga @3amai aselmang ahin, @2Hijeh a chu Pathenin ajah phah @3lou ahiye.

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile nakhut jouseu chu @3thisanin akisuboh gamtan, @2Nakhutjung houjong chu themmona @3adimsoh tai; @1Nakamsung uvin la jouthu jeng @3aseiyin, @2Naleigui uvin jong thu gilou jeng @3asodoh jinge.

@@@1Koima chan thildih-a mi aheh ngaipon, @2Khat chan jong lung thengselin @3danthu aholngaipoi; @1Abonchauva thu homkeova bou kisong @3ahiuvin, @2Jouthujeng aseijiu ahibouve; @1Amahon jou le nal akheng khom jiuvin @2Themmona ahinso doh jiuvin ahi.
@@@1Amahon gulse tuiho jong agalauvin, @2Maimom panjang apheh jiuvin, @1Koi hijongle atuiho nekhapen pa @3chu athijie, @2Chule khat pen pen chu akikhedoh a @3ahileh gulse ahijenge.

@@@1Maimom panjang apheh-u chu ponsila @3jong pang louding, @2Amaho thil semsa chu mihemin ponsila @3jong akisil lou ding ahi. @1Athilbol jouseu themmona kibol @3jeng ahin, @2Akhut’uva pumhat’a thil kibol @3jeng ahibouve.

@@@1Thil gilou lama akengphangu ajang @3khai jelin, @2Chule themmona bei mite thisan aso @3loi jeng jiuvin ahi; @1Amaho lunggel jouse chu themmona @3lunggel jeng ahin, @2Alhanglam dunguva jong gamna le @3manthahna jeng aume.
@@@1Chamna lampi chu ahepouve. @2Akiheina lam lamuva jong thu adih @3a kitanna aumpoi. @1Alamlen u jong jum thet’in @3akisemuvin. @2Hiche dunga vah lut jousen lung @3nopna akimupouve.

@@@1Hijeh chun kakomuva thu adih a akitan @3ding agamla lheh jengin. @2Hijeh hin adih chun eipha jou @3tapouvin ahi; @1Keihon khovah kavelhi jinguvin, @3ahinla vetan muthimjeng ahibouve. @1Khovah changsan kavelhiuvin, ahinla @3muthima kavah leuve.

@@@1Mitcho ho bangin bang kamai le leuvin, @2Mit neilou ho bangin kakimai le leuve; @1Khomut chip cheppet bangin sun @3chang laiyin kakipal lhuvin, @2Thahat tah ho henga keiho hi mithisa @3bang bang kahiuve.

@@@1Savom ho bangin kakithol le kakithol @3leuvin, @2Vahuite bangin kamao maovuve: @1Thu adih kitanna kahol leuvin, @3khat cha la aumpoi. @2Huhhingna kaholuvin, ahinla keiho @3dingin agamla lheh jenge.

@@@1Ajeh chu nangma masanga kasuh khelnau @3apunbe cheh cheh jengin, @2Chule kachonset hou hin keiho douna @3thu aseiye; @1Ijeh-inem itile kasuh khelnau toh @3kaumkhom jinguvin, @2Chule keihon jong kathemmona jouseu @3kakihet nauve;

@@@1Thil kasukhel’uvin, @2Pakai kataitom uvin, @1Ka-Pathenu kajuinauva konin kakihei @3mang tauve; @2Bolgentheina le kidouna thu jeng kaseiyuvin, @1Lungthima konin jouthu jeng kasem @3thu uvin kaseidoh jiuvin ahi.
@@@1Thu adih-a kitanna akinung notan, @2Adih jong chu gamla tah ageitai: @1Ijeh-inem itile thutah chu mipi @2lenna tollhang ningkoi dunga alhamang @3tan, @1Hijeh chun chondihna chu avahlut @3theipoi.
@@@1Thutah chu alhasamin, @2Hijeh chun agilouva kona jamdohpa chu mi @3nehgam din akisemdoh-e. @1Pakaiyin hiche hi amun, hichea thu @3adih-a akitan lou jeh-in @2Alung lhai naisai tapoi.
@@@1Mihem khat cha aumlou amudoh tan, @2Asutang ding khat chabeh a um louhel @3adatmo lheh tai: @1Hichun aban thahat’in gal ajou tan, @2Chule ama dihna ma man adinsah @3jou ahi.
@@@1Pakaiyin adih ompho bangin akivonin, @2Alujanga huhhingna thih lukhuh bangin @3akikhuh-e; @1Aman phulahna ponsil bangin akisil’in, @2Chule ponsila kijel bangin lunghan @3nan akitomjol jenge.

@@@1Mi athilbol dungjui cheh a Pakaiyin @3alethuh cheh ding ahin, @2Amelmate chunga lungsa ding, agalte @3chunga alethuh ding; @1Twikhanglen panga gamsung jouse chu @2A lethuh a phu alah cheh ding ahiye.
@@@1Hijeh chun mihon nilhum lama pat @3Pakai min aginguvin, @2Niso lama pat aloupina aginguve; @1Ajeh chu Pakai hoh lama twi long @3banga hung ding, @2Pakai khopi huiyin asemhoh tobang @3ding ahi.
@@@1Chule Pakai chu Jacob mite @2Asuh khelna kona hung kilekit ho @3dinga @1Zion Lhandampua hung pang ding ahi, @2Tin Pakayin aseiye.

“Chule keima din vang hiche hi amaho toh kakitepna ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye, nachunga um kalhagao le nakam-sunga kakoisa kathusei ho hi nangma kamsunga konin jong, nachate kamsunga konin jong, natute kamsunga konin jong tua pat atonsot geiya potdoh louhel ding ahitai tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
@@@1Thoudoh-in, salvah tan, @2Ajeh chu nakhovah ahung lhung tai; @1Pakai loupina chu @2Nangma chunga ahung lhungtan ahi.

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile vetan, muthimin leiset @3hinkhun tin, @2Muthim lhangkhal chu mitin chunga hung @3kiheh ding; @1Hijongleh Pakai chu nangma chunga @3hung dingdoh intin, @2Nachunga ama loupina chu kimudoh @3ding ahiye.
@@@1Chutengleh namtin vaipi hi nangma @3vah a hunguvin tin, @2Chule lengho jengjong nangma loupi @3vah a hung diu ahi.
@@@1Khodah-in lang nakimvel vetemin, @2Amaho abonchan akikhomuvin na-henga @3ahunguve; @2Gamla tah a konin nachapate hunguvin @3tin, @1Chule nachanute chu min akipom mang @3dingu ahi.

@@@1Chuteng nangman ven natin navah @3hung kikho ding, @2Nalungthima lutjenjena nakipa ding ahi; @1Ijeh-inem itile twikhanglen neng @2jeng jung chu nahenga hung @3kitola @1Namtin vaipi haonan nahin phah @3ding ahiye.

@@@1Sangongsao hon jamah chun nachup @3hel ding ahi @2Mid’ian gam le Ephah gama sangong @3sao lagol ho chun; @1Chule Sheba haona chengse aboncha @2Nangma heng hung lhung ding @3ahiuve. @1Amahon sana le gimnamtui ahinpoh-uva @2Pakai vahchoina chu ahin phonjal @3dingu ahi.

@@@1Kedar’a kelngoi honte nang henga @3hung kikhomuva, @2Nebai’oth’a kelngoi chal ho chun @3nang kin jeng abol diu ahi; @1Hiche ho chu kamaicham chunga @3san-thei dola hung kilhut diu, @2Chuteng keiman ka-in loupi tah chu @3kaloupi sah cheh ding ahi.
@@@1Meilhang banga leng jenjun ho khu @3koi hiuva, @2Vakhute banga abangkot dunguva @3lengdoh hiuvam?

@@@1Ajeh chu twikhanglen pang dunga miten @3keima eingah-uvin tin, @2Tarshish gama kong ho chu amasa pena @1Gamla tah a kona nachapateu leh @2Asana adangkau poh tha dinga hung @3masa ding ahiuve; @1Pakai na-Pathen min jal leh Israelte @2Mithengpa jala, @1Ajeh chu aman nang naloupisah @3ahitai.

@@@1Gamchom mite chapaten napal jouse @3hin genuvin tin, @2Chule aleng teuvin jong nangma kin @3jeng aboldiu ahi; @1Ajeh chu kalungsat pet chun nangma @3kadengin, @2Hijongleh kalung lhai pet’in nachunga @3hepina kaneiye.

@@@1Nakelkot jouse jong honsa um jing @3jeng ding, @2Sun le jan a kikhah louhel ding @3ahiuve: @1Hita chu mihemten namtin vaipi haona @3chu nahenga ahin pohlutna diu, @2Alengteuvin alamkaiya ahon hona hung @3kijot diu ahi.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itile nangma kin bol lou @3nam mite leh lenggam chu @2Mangthah ding ahiuve; @1Hitobang namtin vaipi ho chu @2Keo hela kilha ding ahiuve.

@@@1Lebanon loupina chu nahenga hung @3lhunga, @2Chah thing ahin, theipi thing, meila @3thing ahin @1Keima muntheng jemhoiya hung pang ding @3ahiuve; @2Keiman kakengphang teni kangapna lai @3chu kaloupi sah ding ahi.

@@@1Sun tengle nisa jeng jong nang dinga @3vahchom deh lou ding, @2Jan tengjongle lhavah chun nasalvah @3chom lou ding ahi: @1Amavang Pakai chu nang dinga tonsot @3khovah a panga @2Na-Pathen chu nangma loupina hi @3ding ahi.

@@@1Na-nisan jong lhumtih nei talou ding, @2Na-lhathah jong kitoldoh louhel @3ding ahiye; @1Ijeh-inem itile Pakai chu nang @2dinga tonsot khovah a pang ding, @1Chule nalunghem na nikho jouse @3kichaisoh ding ahitai.
@@@1Namite abonchauva adih changsoh diu, @2Gamsung chu aitih geiya alo @3dingu ahi; @1Keima choiat’a kaum theina dinga @2Kakhutsoh, kakhut tah a kathing @3phu dondoh chu ahi.
@@@1Alhompen tah jong chu mihem phung @3khat hung lhingin tin, @2Aneopen tah jong chu thahat tah mihem @3nam khat lhing ding ahi; @1Keima Pakai chu kahin, @2Thil aphat cha kahin noloi ding ahi.

@@@1Pakai lhagao chu kachunga aume, @2Ijeh-inem itile bolgentheiya umte henga @1Kipana thupha hillhang dinga @2Pakaiyin keima thao einu ahitai: @1Lung gentheite lung damsah dinga @3eihinsola @2Sohchang ho henga lhadohna thu phongdoh @3dinga, @1Songkul lut ho henga @2Songkul kihonna ding phongdoh a,
@@@1Pakai lung lhaina @2Kum phongdoh dinga, @1I-Pathenu phulah nikho phongdoh a @2Alunghem jouse lhamon dinga,

@@@1Amahon thil lui gemsa chengse chu @3sapha kit’uvin tin, @2Masanga kisugepsa alui chengse chu @3atundoh dingu, @1Khopi gemsa ho jong chu asemphat @3phat’uva @2Khang tamtah sunga agemsa ho chu @3asemphat dingu ahi.

@@@1Nangho vang chu Pakai thempute @3nakiti dingu, @2Mihon nangho chu i-Pathenu kin bola @3pang ho nati diu ahi: @1Nanghon namtin vaipi ho gou @3kivahna naneiyuva, @2Amaho haona a chu nangho naloupi @3diu ahiye.

@@@1Najachatna kheluva chanphat nijen @3nachan diu, @2Jalou tah a nakibolnau khela nachan @3nakipapi diu ahi; @1Hijeh a chu nagam sunguva chan ni @3jen nalo diu, @2Nangho dinga tonsot kumkhoa kipana @3hiding ahi.

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile @2Kei Pakai hin thu dih-a kitan @3kadeiyin, @1Thil guh le thil dih lou kahoi; @2Keiman kitah tah a atoh manu kalepeh @3ding, @2Chule amaho toh tonsot kumkhoa kitepna @3kasem ding ahi.

Pakai khut’a nangma lallukhuh melhoitah nahi ding,

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile gollhangin nu-ngah @3akichenpi banga, @2Nachapaten nangma nakichenpi diu, @1Chule jinei dingpa ajinei dingnu chunga @3akipa banga @2Na-Pathen chu nachunga kipah @3ding ahi.

@@@1Vo Jerusalem, keiman napal chung dunga @3kho ngah tampi kakoiyin, @2Amaho chu nilhum lhum jan khovah vah a @3um thim louhel ding ahiuve. @1Nang ho Pakai geldoh jing jeng ho @2Kicholdo hih heluvin.
@@@1Pakai chu umthim theiyin lha hih @3heluvin @2Aman Jerusalem atundoh a Leiset chunga hi @1Vahchoi theiya aumsah kah sen.
@@@1Pakai chu akhut jetlam leh @2Aban thahat panin akihahsel tai. @1“Keiman nalhosoh chang melmate neh dinga @3kapehkit lou ding, @2Gamchom min jong natoh gimga lengpitwi @3adon lou diu ahi;
@@@1Amavang chang apanga kikhol pan bou aneh a @2Pakai avahchoi ding, @1Lengpitwi athal khoma pang hon bou @2Keima muntheng lhong laiya adon diu @3ahibouve,” ati.
@@@1Cheuvin, cheuvin kelkot jouse @3jot paiyun. @2Mipi dingin lampi ong hoiyuvin; @1Laiyuvin, laiyuvin, lhang lamlen chu. @2Song ho chu paidoh-uvin lang @1Mipi chungvuma Ponlap khat domsang uvin.
@@@1Vetan, Pakaiyin leiset kolkimvela @3aphongdoh tan, @2Zion chanu jah a seipeh-uvin lang. @1“Vetan, nahuhhingna ahung lhung tai; @2Ven, kipaman ahin choiyin, a-angsunga @3kipaman akoiye,” tin.
@@@1Chutengleh amaho chu Mithengte Pakai @3lhatdamsa te kiti diu ahi; @2Chule nangma jong ‘Holdohsa, @1Dalhah thipsa hilou khopi’ nakiti @3ding ahi.

@@@1Edoma kona hungpa, @2Bozrah a kona ponsandup kisila hungpa @3Ponsil loupi tah kisil pa. @1Ama thahat nasatah a hung kitolpa khu @3koi ham? @2“Hiche hi keima kahin, them channa @3kaphondoh a @1Huhhing hat tah kahi,” tin aseiye.
@@@1Ipi dinga naponsil hiti san hiya @2Chule napon jouse lengpithei chilna @3kichilsan tobang ham?

@@@1“Keiman lengpithei chilna a chun kachangseh-in @3kachil lhan, @2Mipi lah a konin koimachan eichil @3hu poi; @1Hiche ho chu kalunghan pet’a kachil @3chaisa ahin, @2Kalungsat pet’a kachotphasa ahiuve; @1Ahinnau thisan chu keima ponsil chung @3dunga akithe khumin, @2Kavon jouse kasunat gamtai.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itile kalungthima phulah ding @3nikho kana-gel jing, @2Chule kalhatdamna ding nikho ahung @3lhung tai.
@@@1Kavet vet vangin panpi ding koimacha @3aumpon, @2Eiki tijat sah bep’in koimacha eilhamon @3thei aumpoi; @1Hijeh chun kaban thahat ma man @3gal kajouvin, @2Chule kalungsat chun eiphong dinge.
@@@1Kalunghan hin mitin kapal jelin, @2Kalungsat chu twidon bangin kadon @3chimsah-e. @1Ahin nau thisan jeng jong chu @2Leiset’a kalhoh lha lha jenge.” @3ati.

@@@1Pakaiyin eithilpeh dungjuiyuvin @2Keiman Pakai lungset long lou chuleh @1Pakai vahchoina chengse chu @2Avel velin velsim kit’ing kate; @1Aphatna len tah Israel insung anapehsa @2Ahepina vanga amaho anapeh dungjui @1Alungset long lou @2Thalhing dungjuiyin.
@@@1Ajeh chu Pakaiyin aseiyin, amaho hi @3keima mite mong mong ahiuvin, @2Jouva thilbol louhel ding chapate @3ahiuve; @1Hichea chun Pakai hi @2Ahuhhingpau vin ahung pang tai.

@@@1Amaho kibol gentheina chana @2Pakai jong kibol genthei ahin, @1Chule amasanga pang @2Vantil chun amaho ahuhhing tai; @1Alungset jeh le alainatpi jeh-in @3amaho alhatdam in, @2Amaho chu aphong dingin khang lui laiya @3pat ahinpui peh-in ahi.
@@@1Ahinla amahon adoumah aboluvin, @2Alhagao Theng chu analung himo @3sah-uvin ahi; @1Hijeh chun amatah amaho melma-in @3akiheidoh tan, @2Atahsa tah-in amaho dounan gal @3asat tai.

@@@1Chuphat’in aman khang luilai, @2Amite le Mose nikho lai chu ahin @3geldoh tai; @1Twikhanglena hinpui doh pa, @2Kelngoi ching ho toh hinpuidoh tha @3pa chu hoiba hitam? @1Alah-uva Alhagao Theng chensah pa @2Hoilama ba umah hi tam?
@@@1Aban thahat loupi tah Mose khut jetlam @3to kijot jingsapa, @2Amasang uva amin kihet jingna dinga @1Twipi hom khen hel jenga
@@@1Twito jot paiya Israelte pui @3galkaipa chu? @2Neldi lah a sakol che bangin amaho @3akibalhu pouve.
@@@1Phaicham thuh tah a gancha kumsuh @3bangin @2Pakai Lhagaovin amaho chu akicholdo @3sah tai. @1Hijeh chun nangma min thanna din @2Namite chu na nalamkaitan ahi.
@@@1Vana konin hung kunin lang @2Nachenna mun theng le loupi tah a @3konin hinven. @1Natom ngaina le nathahat hoiya @3umah hitam? @2Nalungthim ngaichat le navoujang natna @3keidin akituh tang tai.

@@@1Ajeh chu nangma keiho Pakai nahi. @2Abraham in eihet khah louvuva @1Chule Israel in eina het khah lou @3vanguvin; @2O Pakai, nangma ka Pau nahin @3Eilhatdampu-u nahiye, @1Khanglui laiya pat hiche hi nangma @3min ahi jinge.
@@@1O Pakai, ibola nangin nalampi ho neiho @3khel sah-uva @1Nangma kagin louna dinguva kalungthimu @3natahsah hitam? @1Nalhacha ho khohsah jal leh @2Nagoulo phung mite jalin hung @3kile kit tan.
@@@1Nangma mithengten namuntheng chu phat @3chomkhat alo’uvin, @2Kakidoupi teuvin muntheng chu keng @3chotphan aneitauve.
@@@1Keiho hi achunguva navaihom khah louhelna @3mite kabang uvin, @2Nangma mina kikou louhel mite @3kabang tauve.
@@@1O Pakai van hi nahin phet vanga @2Nahung kumlhah ding hijeng leh, @1Na-angsung a molsang jouse jong @2Kihot ling soh thei ahin
@@@1Meiyin phoinal lah akah bang leh twi @3ahulsat bang ding, @2Nangma douho henga namin kihetsah ding, @1Hita chu namtin vaipi hi @2Nangma angsunga kitihot hot @3ding ahiuve!
@@@1Keihon vet’a kanei louvu tijat umtah @3thil nabol chun @2Nangma nahung kumlhan ahileh @1Na-angsunga molsang jouse @2Akihot lingsoh helin ahiye.

@@@1Khang lui laiya pat koima chan ja @3jong ajakha pon, @2Nakhangin jong anaja kha hih hel e. @1Nangma tailou mihem mit hin pathen @3dang amukhapoi, @2Ama ngah jing ho dinga natoh pehji @3nangma tailou adang aumpoi.

@@@1Kipah tah a adih jeng bolpa, @2Nadanthua nang nageldoh jing ho chu @1Nangin nakimuto pi jin ahi. @2Vetan, nangma nalung hangin, keiho @3kachonseuve; @1Kachonset chenguva phat sottah @3umsa kahitauvin, @2Achutileh huhhinga kaum jou dingu @3hinam?

@@@1Kabonchauvin miboh bep bep kahitauvin @2Chule kathildih bol chengseu jong @3von kisuboh abang gamtai; @1Kabon chauvin nathel bangin kapul @3gamuvin, @2Kathemmona chengseuvin huilhoh-in @3eilhoh mang gamtauve.

@@@1Nangma mina taova khat chabeh aum @3tapon, @2Nangma kolchah dinga akitil khouva @3aumpoi; @1Ajeh chu nangin kakom uvah namai @3nasel mang tan, @2Chule kathemmona hou khut luma lou @3din neipedoh tauvin ahi.
@@@1Hijongleh O Pakai, nangma keiho @3Pa nahin, @2Keiho bellei bep kahiuvin, keiho beldena @3eidengpau nang nahi; @1Keiho kabon chauva @2Nangma khutsoh jeng kahiuve.
@@@1O Pakai, lunghang behseh hih helin, @2Chule tonsot geiyin themmona geldoh @3jing da tan; @1Vetemin lang ngaito temin @2Keiho kabonchauva nangma mite @3jeng kahiuve.
@@@1Nakhopi theng ho jong chu gammang @3asoh gam tan, @2Zion jong gammang asoh tan, @1Jerusalem jong dalhah thip’in aumtai.
@@@1Keiho dinga intheng le inhoi tah, @2Kapu kapateuvin nangma navahchoi @3nau in chu; @1Meiyin akavam soh-in, @2Keiho dia mun nom lai jouse jong @3khogem jeng ahitai.
@@@1O Pakai, thilsoh hichengpia hi nakitim @3nah laiya @2Thip beh a nauma keiho engse tah a @3neibol genthei nah lai diu ham?

@@@1Keima eidong louhel hon @2Eiholdoh dinguva kigosa kahin. @1Keima eihol louhel hon @2Eimudoh dinguva kiphaldohsa kahi; @1Keiman kamina eikou kha louhel @3nam mite jah a chun @2“Hikoma kaume, hikoma kaume,” kati.
@@@1Kakhut teni hi nilhum lhumin @2Doumah mah bol mite chunga @3kajah jingin, @1Lampi phalouva lam lha ho. @2Amaho lung gel gela chonte,
@@@1Kamaikoh a keima eiphin phin mite, @2Honsung dunga kilhaina bola cheh chung @3dunga gimnamtui lhut ho;
@@@1Lhankhuh dunga tou jinga, @2Mun thip lai laiya khovah vah ho; @1Vohsa neh a hat’a @2Amebel sung dunguva thet umtah tah @3satwi kitun ho.

@@@1Hita hi, “Kitum sah-in, @2Kahenga hung lut hih-in, @1Ijeh-inem itile keima nang dinga @3eikithenso ahitai,” ti ho; @1Hiche ho hi kanah hom sung tenia @3meikhu bang bep ahiuvin, @2Nilhum lhuma kong kongji @1Meikong tobang bep ahibouvui.
@@@1Vetan, ka-angsunga hiche hi akisunin @2“Kei umthim ponge, kasahdoh soh kei @3ding ahi, @1‘Ahiye, a-op lhanguva kaluipeh @2Mong mong ding ahi.

@@@1Nangho themmona jouse leh @2Napu napateu themmona jouse pumin,’ @3tin Pakaiyin aseiye; @1Ipijeh-inem itile amahon molsang chung dunga @2Gimnamtui ahalnam uvin @1Thinglhang dunga keima eihouse seu @3vin ahi, @2Masanga athilbol chengseu jeh a @1Keiman tohman a-op lhang dimset’a @2Katedoh peh ding ahi,” ati.

@@@1Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, @2“Lengpitwi chu aga lom lah a akimeh @3doh banga, @1Amahon jong, ‘Hiche chu suse hih-o, @2Hichea chun phattheina aumbouve,’ @3ati banguva, @1Keiman jong kalhacha ho khohsah jeh @3a hita chu kabol ding, @2Abonchauva kasuh mang lou ding ahi.

@@@1Keiman Jacob’a konin son le pah @3tampi hinpuidoh ing ting; @2Judah a konin keima molsang dung @3lo ding puidoh inge; @1Kalhenchom ten molsang dung chu @3alo dingu, @2Chule hikoma chu keima lhacha ho @3cheng ding ahiuve.
@@@1Sharon chu kelngoi hon ho @2Lhatle na hamhing gam hung soh ding, @1Achor phaicham jong gancha ho @3kolle na a @2Hung pang ding ahi @1Keima eihol hol kamite dia @2Hitia chu hung soh ding ahi.
@@@1Amavang nangho Pakai dalha ho leh @2Keima lhangtheng sumil ho, @1Hamphatna phunsanna dinga dokhan @3kidoa @2Ajotna lhun theina dinga lengpitwi @3le khamna thei khona kihal ho;

@@@1Keiman nangho hi chemjama lou dia @3kakoiya, @2Nabonchauva mithat pa angsunga nakun @3cheh diu ahi; @1Ipijeh-inem itile kahin kou pet chun @3nanghon neidonbut pouvin, @2Thu kaseipet jong chun na-ngai pouve; @1Ahin keima mitmua agilou chubou @3naboluvin, @2Kadeimo mo joh nakilhen @3tauve,” ati.

@@@1Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin @3aseiye, @2“Vetan, Kalhacha ho chun an nen tin, @1Nangho vang nagilkel dingu ahi; @2Vetan, kalhacha ho chun twi adon @3dingu ahin, @1Nangho vang nadang chah dingu ahiye; @2Vetan keima lhacha ho chu @1Kipah ding ahiuvin @2Nangho vang jachatna nachuh diu @3ahiye;
@@@1Vetan, keima lhacha ho chun lungthim @3kipana la asah diu ahin, @2Nangho vang lungthim hesoh a naka @3dingu ahi; @1Chujongleh nanghon lung gim hesoh @3thoh thoh a Na mao mao dingu ahi.
@@@1Nanghon kalhenchomte dinga gaosap theiset @3minse tah nadalhah diu ahi. @2Ajeh chu Pakai Pathenin natha @3dingu ahi; @1Ama lhacha ho vang chu @2Pakaiyin min chombeh khat’a akou @3ding ahi.

@@@1Hijeh a chu gamsunga @2Ama le ama phatthei kiboh pa chu @1Pathen a dih tah-a ama le ama @2Phatthei kiboh ding ahi. @1Chule gamsunga kihahselna bolpan @3jong @2Pathen a dih tah-a kihahselna @3abol ding ahi; @1Ijeh-inem itile gimna masa jouse @3akisumil tan, @2Keima mit mun akisel mang soh tai.
@@@1Ijeh-inem itile neive temin, @2Keiman vanthah le leiset thah @3khat kaseme; @1Chule thil masa chengse chu kigeldoh @3kit lou ding @2Lunggila jong hung chukit lou @3ding ahi.
@@@1Hijongle keima thilsemsa chunga chun @2Thanomin lang kipah jingin; @1Ajeh chu neive temin, @2Keiman kipana dingin Jerusalem kasemin, @1Amite jong khu Thanopna dinga kasem @3ahiye.
@@@1Keima Jerusalem chung changa kipah @3ing ting, @2Kamite chung changa kathanop ding ahi; @1Asunga chu ka-gin kija kha kit @3louhel ding, @2Lunggima hesohna ogin jong kija kha @3louhel ding ahi.

@@@1Asunga chu chomkah louva thi jeng thei @2Naosen peng jong um lou ding ahin; @1Ateh thi lou ding upa jong um lou @3ding ahi. @1Ajeh chu naosen peng jong kum ja khat @3jouva thi cheh ding ahi; @2Amavang chonse ho kum ja khat @3hing thei chu @1Gaosap chang ding ahiye.
@@@1Kamiten in tampi akisah-uva asunga @3cheng diu, @2Lengpilei tampi akiboluva aga aneh @3dingu ahiye.

@@@1Amaho in sahsa chu midang cheng @3lou ding, @2Amahon hon aboluva midangin aga @3aneh lou ding ahi; @1Ijeh-inem itile thing phung khat @3hinkho banga chu @2Kamite hinkho jong hung um @3ding ahi; @1Kalhen chomten akhut tah-uva @2Atohgau phat sotpi nom asah @3pi dingu ahi.

@@@1Amahon pannabeiya na atoh lou @3dingu ahin. @2Toset toh dinga jong chale nao @3ahinlou dingu ahi; @1Ijeh-inem itile amaho chu Pakai @3phattheiboh @2Sonle pah hidiu, achateu jong amaho @3toh umkhom jing ding ahiuve.
@@@1Amahon eihin kou masanguva keiman @3kakou ding, @2Thu seina laiyu jongleh kajah jeng @3ding ahi.

@@@1Kamkei le kelngoi jong hung @3lhakhom ding, @2Sakeiyin jong bongchal banga changpol @3aneh ding ahi; @1Gul jong leivuiya kivah ding ahi. @2Hiche ho chun keima lhang theng @3chung dunga chu @2Subset khoiset imacha aneilou @3dingu ahi @1Tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
@1Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, “Van hi keima @3laltouna ahin, @2Leiset hi kakengto ngapna ahiye; @1Nanghon itobang in neisahpeh dingu hiya, @2Chule kacholdona mun chu @1Hoiche ba ham?

@@@1Thil hichengpi hi keiman kakhut’a @3kasem cheh ahin, @2Hijeh a chu aboncha hi keiya ahi, @3tin Pakaiyin aseiye. @1Ahinla keiman kavet khoh ding @3mi chu @2Lhagaova lungnem a lungkhel pa @1Keima thusei ajah tengleh @2Kitihot hotpa chubou ahiye.

@@@1Bongchal that mi chu @2Mihem that tobang bang ahin, @1Kelngoiya kilhaina bolpa jong chu @2Uicha ngong heboh peh pa tobangma @3ahiye. @1Chang thilto hinchoipa jong chu @2Vohcha thisan thiltoa tohpa bepma ahi; @1Gimnamtui melchihna thilto bolpa @3jong @2Milim kisemthu phatthei boh boh @3jengpa tobang ahi. @1Hiche ho hin ama ama lampi cheh @3akilhenu ahitan, @2Thil thet umtah ho abolnauva jong @3hin alungthimu akipahjoi;

@@@1Ken jong amaho dinga bolgentheina @3kalhenpeh ding, @2Chule achunguva kichatna kalhun @3khumding ahi; @1Ijeh-inem itile @2Keiman kakoupet chun @1Koima chan eihin donbut pouvin, @2Keiman thu kaseipet chun @1Amahon thu angai pouve; @2Ahin keima mitmun agilou bou @3aboluvin, @2Chule keima kipana louhel chu akilhen @3tauvin ahi,” ati.

@@@1Pakai thusei ngaiyuvin, @2Nangho athuseiya kitihot hot ho: @1“Nasopi houvin nahot boluva @2Keima min jala napaidoh-uva. @1‘Pakai chu choian tangem, @2Keihon jong nakipana chu vetah tangu,’ @3tia seiho; @1Ahinla amaho chubou hijah ahi @2Akijumso ding ho chu.
@@@1Ngai temun, khopi sunga kona @3ogin pikhu! @2Houina kona ogin pi khu! @1Pakai ogin ahin, @2Amelmate chunga phulahna ogin @3ki thong ahiye!
@@@1Anaoso nat masangin, cha ahingdoh tan, @2Asonat’in ahinphah masangin @1Numeichun Chapa khat ahingtai.

@@@1Koiham hitobang thil jakha a? @2Koiham hitobang thil mukha a chu? @1Gam leiset khat chu nikhat sunga @3naosoa soh jeng theiya, @2Mihem namkhat chu phat chom khat @3kah seh a kisodoh thei ham? @1Ajeh chu Zion hi asonat nat leh @2Achapa jouse ahingdoh jengin ahi.
@@@1Keiman cha hing dinga kagon mai @3maiya @2So lhah sah louva kaumsah ding ham? @3tin Pakaiyin aseiye; @1Kei naoso lhah sah pan @2Naobu kasin beh ding ham? @3tin na-Pathenin aseiye.
@@@1Jerusalem toh kipah khomuvin, @3ama dingin thanom uvin @2Angailua nangho nabonchau vin; @1Ama hi kipah-in thanop piuvin @2Achung changa lunghempi nanghon;
@@@1Hita chu aman amilhep lung mongna @2Anoi teni nachep’uva nachim theina @3dinguvin; @1Chule aloupina thalhingset’a kona @2Dangvot jin jena nadon chimsohna @3dinguvin,” ati.

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, @2Neive temin, ken Jerusalem kahao sah-a @3hao twi lona kalonsah ding, @1Chule namtin vaipi haona chu @2Vadung kamlet jeng jung banga @3kadip ding ahi; @1Chutengle nanghon noichep’a nachep’uva @2Min akong janga nao apoh banga @3napoh diu, @1Chule aphei chunga @2Nakichop chop dingu ahiye.
@@@1Minun achapa alhep lung mong @3banga @2Keiman jong kalhep lung mong @3ding nahiuve; @1Jerusalema Nangho lhep lung monga @3nachen diu ahi.

@@@1Nanghon namu tei tei dingu, @2Chule nalungthimu kipah ding ahi; @1Nagu nachangu jong Lou nou banga @3nou ding ahi; @2Chutengle Pakai khut alhacha ho toh @1Akilhon jing jenge, ti kihedoh ding ahin, @2Chule alung himona chu amelmate @3chunga @1Ahat jinge, ti kihedoh ding ahi.

@@@1Ijeh-inem itile vetan, @2Pakai chu meikonga hung ding, @1Chule akangtalai ho chu huile go @3kitho bang ding; @1Alungsatna ehjeng junga hung @3kisena @2Chule amiphona chu meisi pah lah @3lah hung bang ding ahi.
@@@1Ajeh chu Pakaiyin meikonga thu @3atana @2Chule chemjam apat’a tahsa a hing @3jouse chunga thu atan ding ahi; @1Chule Pakai thagam mihem chu @2Atama tam ding ahiuve.
“Amaho acham chama kisuthenguva, hon lei dunga chea, alai lunga mi khat nung juilea, thet umtah vohsa nea, jucha sa neho chu abonchauva hung mahthah khom cheh ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
“Ijeh-inem itile keiman anatoh jouse leh alunggel jouseu kahen, namtin vaipi jouse leh pao tin pao tanga mi khom khomsoh dingin kahunge; chule amaho jong hunguvin tin aloupina ahung mu diu ahi,

chutengleh keiman alah-uva melchihna khat kakoi ding ahi. Chule alah-uva ahingdoh amoh chengse chu namtin vaipi lah a kasol ding, Tarshish lang ahin, Put lam ahin, thalpi kamsa koi jing Lud lam ahin, Tubal lam ahin, Javan lam ahin, kamin kithang jakha lou laihel leh kaloupina mukha loulai hel, gamla tah a um twikhanglen pang dung geiya kasol ding ahiuve; amahon namtin vaipi ho lah a keima loupina aga phonjal dingu ahi.

Namtin vaipiho chun nasopiteu chu namtin vaipi ho lah lah a kona ahin toluva, Pakai henga thilto ding banga, sakol ho chunga jong, kangtalai ho chunga jong, talai ho chunga jong, sakolpol ho chunga jong, sangongsao ho chunga jong, Israel miten bel theng sunga Pakai insunga chang thilto ding ahin choi bang banguva, keima molsang theng Jerusalem a cheng dia ahin tol lut dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chule amaho abang bang chu keiman thempu dia kalhendoh-a, a bang bang Levi kahisah ding ahiuve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

@@@1“Ijeh-inem itile keiman kasemdoh ding @2Van thah le leiset thah chu @1Ka-angsunga umden jing jeng ding ahi. @2Tin Pakaiyin aseiye. @1Hitobanga chu nason napah-u jong @2Umden jing jeng ding ahiuve.
@@@1Lhathah sim lhathah seh ahin, @2Cholngah nikho sim cholngah nikho @3seh hileh @1Tahsa a hing jouse keima angsunga @2Chibai boh dinga hung ding ahiuve, @3tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Chutengleh amaho kijotdoh-uvin tin keima doumah mah bolji mihem thisa thilong ho chu avet dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile a than ho jong thi louhel ding ahiuvin, ameikongu jong chu kisumit louhel ding, tahsa a hing jouse dinga lohso umtah hi ding ahiuve,” ati.
